69% of Democrats agree that voters in Arizona were denied their sacred right to vote.

But this isn't just about Republicans or Democrats. This is about the right of all Americans to vote! A right that many voters were sadly deprived of on November 8th.

clean_body: This is about our sacred right to vote. This is about our sacred right to vote. | 69% of Democrats agree that voters in Arizona were denied their sacred right to vote. But this isn't just about Republicans or Democrats. This is about the right of all Americans to vote! A right that many voters were sadly deprived of on November 8th. That is why we have been filing these lawsuits. My team is busy at work as we try to fix this mess of an election...IF you want to protect the future of our nation from this den of leftist thieves, can you chip into our efforts? | -Kari Lake

body:

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Big Tech Censorship Exposed! Election Law Update, Heavy Lifting Needed By Congress
body: Judicial Watch President TomFitton discusses “Big Tech” censorship, the latest revelations on the #TwitterFiles, what Congress has to do to tackle corruption issues, and much more! [INSIDE JW] BIG TECH CENSORSHIP EXPOSED! ELECTION LAW UPDATE, HEAVY LIFTING NEEDED BY CONGRESS [Weekly Update] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61349&L=28545&F=T&] Judicial Watch Monitors Georgia Election Polls During Run-Off As part of our ongoing election integrity efforts, we had volunteer observers on the ground, monitoring polling sites in Georgia this week during the post-Election Day run-off. Our legal team monitored Fulton, Dekalb, Cobb, Gwinnett, Cherokee, Forsyth, and other counties. We do this to ensure compliance with state and federal laws. Our observers have monitored many state and national elections and have been certified and served as international election observers. Our lead election law attorney Robert Popper established the organization’s election monitoring program. Popper is a former deputy chief of the Voting Section, in the Civil Rights Division of the Department of Justice and a veteran poll observer for the Department of Justice. Georgia has improved its election system in recent years but, as we saw in Maricopa County, Arizona, many problems can pop up. We will keep you apprised of developments in Georgia, as well as in our many ongoing election integrity efforts across the country. COURT HEARING IN LAWSUIT CHALLENGING ILLINOIS COUNTING BALLOTS RECEIVED UP TO TWO WEEKS AFTER ELECTION DAY U.S. District Court Judge John F. Kness conducted a court hearing [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61349&L=28532&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2Jvc3Qtdi1pbC1oZWFyaW5nLW9yZGVyLTAyNzU0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=] this week in the case we filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two other registered Illinois voters to prevent state election officials from extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law (_Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews_ [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61349&L=27398&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21pY2hhZWwtYm9zdC1ldC1hbC12LWlsLWJvYXJkLW9mLWVsZWN0aW9ucy1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDI3NTQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] (No. 1:22-cv-02754)). We filed the lawsuit [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61349&L=27407&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGF3c3VpdC1hZ2FpbnN0LWlsbGlub2lzLXRvLXN0b3AtY291bnRpbmctb2YtYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] on May 25, 2022. Christine Svenson, Esq., of Svenson Law Offices in Palatine, Illinois, is assisting us with the lawsuit. On November 11, 2022, Judge Kness rejected [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61349&L=28344&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2Jvc3Qtdi1pbC1tYWlsLWluLWJhbGxvdHMtcnVsaW5nLWFuZC1vcGluaW9uLTAyNzU0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=] a motion by the Democratic Party of Illinois to intervene as a defendant in our lawsuit [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61349&L=28354&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsaW5vaXMtdm90ZS1jb3VudGluZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE] challenging the Illinois election law permitting mail-in ballots to be received as long as two weeks after Election Day. Federal law defines Election Day as “the first Tuesday after the first Monday in November of every even-numbered year.” The initial complaint states: “Despite Congress’ clear statement regarding a single national Election Day, Illinois has expanded Election Day by extending by 14 days the date for receipt and counting of vote-by-mail ballots.” We point out that the current Illinois election law allows vote-by-mail ballots received up to 14 days “after the polls close on Election Day” to be counted as if they were cast and received on or before Election Day. Illinois law also provides that “[e]ven vote-by-mail ballots without postmarks shall be counted if received up to 14 calendar days after Election Day if the ballots are dated on or before Election Day.” Until next week ... The post Election Integrity Update! [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61349&L=28546&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZWxlY3Rpb24taW50ZWdyaXR5LXVwZGF0ZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE] appeared first on Judicial Watch [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61349&L=15151&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmc/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE]. [32x32x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61349&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] [32x32x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61349&L=14&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61349&L=15&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vdXNlci9KdWRpY2lhbFdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] [32x32x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61349&L=1285&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2022, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61349&L=885&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL21lbWJlcnMuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==] | Unsubscribe [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/unsubscribe.php?M=27089954&C=eea98a79fb2fad93cccd0bd228df4000&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=38&N=61349&AGENCY=jw] View in browser [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?&L=1&M=27089954&N=61349&AGENCY=jw&]

body:
| | | [](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q-kyfu5_pqyno_gVYEQwUIE5A4nX9scofuA3ONYjAPr6dOudPJ-jXezOq6sS4bTHzclRrOAp3rDi8QT-iMnm8PwjCGhcPzaJf18add7mXWQNipgxyPhnS3RfNJ315d-ARTkUt45VqwDdid7y7iGIu_vnMaXyrmZXmNYF5IBFbYKpbqAa9y0_arE8GeRl6UXmh2ShvW-DElMWFJcvjtwyRet3kCrkpvbCRuOrwG_DjwxTiWbHDiPBkJsEg5bffJZkN4qDOwu6soHGO4mEpALMk6Xl6uIJzO8ejhAuljlaEuAMg/3rv/TGkn_myOTcWntFfOsNQhpw/h0/etRzJy2kv3STdp6uczbRYlxufNfLZMrqRcTGW4_D-58)
Peter, In case you haven't seen the news, Kyrsten Sinema has officially left the Democratic Party. She told us what we already knew: she's not a Democrat and she's only out for herself.
As you know, we launched this effort over a year ago in order to lay the groundwork to defeat Kyrsten Sinema. In some ways, our job just got easier. And in other ways, it got tougher. Simply put, this is no longer just about beating Kyrsten Sinema in a primary. Now, we need to prepare for a general election, win a potential three-way race against both Sinema and a Republican -- and make sure that a REAL Democrat represents Arizona. (We'll be changing our name soon.)
But the mission has stayed the same: we're going to replace Kyrsten Sinema with a real Democrat, because Arizonans deserve a Senator who cares about them, not special interests like Wall Street and Big Pharma.
And we're going to need your help in order to win.
**[If you can, please chip in $5 or any amount you can in order to make sure we have the funds we need to defeat the now Independent Kyrsten Sinema in a general election.](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSzGmtY3EQAHz0UeAnt7RsPq80qTbyv4iO0FjVEVs9z7qjYlaXocUTrXJRofViV8S1Cytq-0X1YfVkErV3_m9iaIteWxIFZUrQspDEpmukiwukJMhFjXA-pcvUJ-VWebAI4fefJ6qJteJd-2W2vJqj45GXHCVEKrhLW8PhRXwX1G7mKS1zGLvrSRMa-Se6kF2D68bFH65OaAjSAS9EMOPg1HoeYgIdOKtHZqwxRqmMustNih0cMYd4qR5sYoevZFbMMev1h2N4QY-aZqAxyKUg1pWVvwOMd2Sp5xlxJVjGUCqDSRnX6gjKjMc4PzivZ3Ri7OmE6elqCCV-EvDgU8WDrFwesWKRDKsqvstZPfEwkpCql7XToHnaIddF7BkLD2bP/3rv/TGkn_myOTcWntFfOsNQhpw/h1/Yb_UHl9SmGbHl53rUnznzoDW7t3U_A0AcmC8MzQ6yts)** We already knew Sinema didn't care about her constituents or the people who helped elect her, but this is still a slap in the face. Sinema spent years lying about who she was and making phony promises, asking for money and volunteer hours and votes from Democrats.
It's painful. And all the more reason why this effort is more important than ever before. Kyrsten Sinema is only out for herself. Now, we need to deliver for Arizonans and elect a Senator -- a Democratic Senator -- who won't forget where they came from or the people who elected them.
We're going to continue our work holding Kyrsten Sinema accountable. (And we'll let you know soon about our new name.)
**** **[Please chip in if you can to keep our work going >>](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSzGmtY3EQAHz0UeAnt7RsPtj9Z9ro4u70McybMJk_ErEf39w5UDCta7CGNUqust1eF7bZ49TBe0elVGIyr0ZGasG3VxFanabTJSyBZ3mzNBLe1_P1Ra7LUjsPwok8vwnVL5NpCM-tei4r1i9w921PWgKopOqvo7EWN8hKDMiDApNOaYEnNJNt48gugNX7rXiL5n-SxiqJxYGGqPMmVWRvb9-pgx9j7RaCvl3H27S7LFGzqROHBNk3ROmDiUCbv2w1yQtse0b-u-Aqao6CC9Qw1RpkI5yylNmUNFGzKMa6Afx9pO_FNMOnylKUUEPijMfVmPclDKWAirFhXVUgJURJI5tqg96cqXxamCBQnTVutijvlLb9eNiZGczDctu5UXhn/3rv/TGkn_myOTcWntFfOsNQhpw/h2/3NUqK0dbKv05AOgeBm2Sff7Cl8caDzYLgjLM6FIu-hA)** [CHIP IN](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSzGmtY3EQAHz0UeAnt7RsPrbhh3jppxMPmxX-x4YHdL9pnHSRHKh0353FWwucjf3fFFYOUo3RM7guwOhqtki3ab3_QMB8wfytwjZZQ9BIGZrb1ejz8FDVTut04UPxOhoPgDwC2Re3S6Rk8iat-psqfj7Q7ihGckI1UdphcfjoNcJ_7nuxKUDu1M-J5HAC-_vC-m4u6_QETNOhy_-wohyBQQf9Z6p1ewO8LaUt41luiuWXuSZFF3uClXhpk2IqfY30GlZzcvom1jeNKS983LQXbNgzy41aWNiHT_c2SCQ54sHZgXH2CEjGCOfHVEi5DLkd_tuHhDF0DNNcCdFNYUhKN_dmaNSG7djfsxctcJz9SMzEtJkYHSBSPDjyIuiyRmNQ/3rv/TGkn_myOTcWntFfOsNQhpw/h3/Sf6DKKyUXywdwnsgNpwCOptzecC3MbhHYqEtcwlJk6c) Thanks for sticking with us, \--The team at Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Republican Confirmation via NRSC
subject: Are you still a dedicated Republican?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Confirm now | Peter,

Now that the 2022 Election Cycle is officially over, our data team is updating the **NRSC GOP Verification Roster.**

We must receive YOUR response to confirm or deny that you are still a committed Republican, **or we will REMOVE you from the NRSC GOP Roster forever.**

name: Election Watch, NDRC
subject: why far-right groups are spending big money in races that might surprise you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
and what it could it mean for 2024
|
---

You may not have noticed, team, but during the 2022 midterm elections, far-right groups quietly funneled cash into races that hardly ever get any news coverage: races for state supreme court seats.

These races used to be relatively low-profile and nonpartisan. But now, the GOP is changing that by spending _millions_ to prop up openly right-wing judicial candidates. **Their next target is Wisconsin, where an upcoming race in early 2023 could reshape the majority on the state’s highest court – and the future of a number of vital issues in the state.**

[**_We know we can expect conservative groups to spend big money to elect judges who they believe will rubber-stamp their far-right agenda. Can we count on you to pitch in to support the NDRC’s efforts to fight back against far-right groups across the country?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55775912/382788927/-1059731020?amount=30&refcode=20221209.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2MDE4NmZkLTI1NzgtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vOmcpTH2N6P5TWht96HECfvlDqCWwLvcdckAgUPXTQc=)

Team, we cannot afford to ignore this Wisconsin Supreme Court race. The outcome will have huge consequences for issues like:
* Whether Wisconsin conservatives will be allowed to enforce an abortion ban that was passed _before the Civil War_.
* Whether the court will uphold maps that are so gerrymandered, Republicans nearly won _supermajorities_ in both chambers in the legislature – despite Democrats winning the statewide vote for governor!
* **And, crucially, whether Republican lawmakers can _ignore the will of Wisconsin voters_ by overturning the state’s presidential election results in 2024.**

**Simply put, democracy is on the line in Wisconsin.** That’s why it is vital that Wisconsin elect a fair-minded justice who will defend both bodily autonomy and the future of our elections.

The NDRC is committed to helping elect officials who will defend fair maps and a strong democracy nationwide, but we can’t do it without you. [**_So please, will you chip in – even if it’s just a few dollars?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55775914/382788929/-1059731020?amount=30&refcode=20221209.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2MDE4NmZkLTI1NzgtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vOmcpTH2N6P5TWht96HECfvlDqCWwLvcdckAgUPXTQc=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: and what it could it mean for 2024 | You may not have noticed, team, but during the 2022 midterm elections, far-right groups quietly funneled cash into races that hardly ever get any news coverage: races for state supreme court seats. These races used to be relatively low-profile and nonpartisan. But now, the GOP is changing that by spending millions to prop up openly right-wing judicial candidates. Their next target is Wisconsin, where an upcoming race in early 2023 could reshape the majority on the state’s highest court – and the future of a number of vital issues in the state. = Team, we cannot afford to ignore this Wisconsin Supreme Court race. The outcome will have huge consequences for issues like: Whether Wisconsin conservatives will be allowed to enforce an abortion ban that was passed before the Civil War. Whether the court will uphold maps that are so gerrymandered, Republicans nearly won supermajorities in both chambers in the legislature – despite Democrats winning the statewide vote for governor! And, crucially, whether Republican lawmakers can ignore the will of Wisconsin voters by overturning the state’s presidential election results in 2024. Simply put, democracy is on the line in Wisconsin. That’s why it is vital that Wisconsin elect a fair-minded justice who will defend both bodily autonomy and the future of our elections. The NDRC is committed to helping elect officials who will defend fair maps and a strong democracy nationwide, but we can’t do it without you. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:

| | **BREAKING FROM POLITICO:** **Sen. Kyrsten Sinema ABANDONS Democratic Party, switching registration to Independent**

[We need a REAL Democrat to replace her, so we’re launching an urgent petition to draft Arizona Rep. Ruben Gallego to run! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/draft-gallego-22/?source=VPP_20221209_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=6&akid=5797%2E878179%2EBBlNz0) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/draft-gallego-22/?source=VPP_20221209_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=7&akid=5797%2E878179%2EBBlNz0) | | [**10,000 SIGNATURE GOAL: SIGN BY MIDNIGHT TO DRAFT ARIZONA REP. RUBEN GALLEGO AND SECURE THE SENATE »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/draft-gallego-22/?source=VPP_20221209_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=8&akid=5797%2E878179%2EBBlNz0)
---
Here’s the deal – our Democratic Senate majority was just knocked down... _we’re back to our razor-thin 50 ‐50 SPLIT._

Luckily, Arizona Rep. Ruben Gallego is a _perfect fit_ to replace Senator Sinema! _He’s been a staunch supporter of President Biden’s agenda from day one._

**But now, everything’s in flux – and Rep. Gallego won’t run for the Senate without a surge of grassroots support in this critical moment.**

[So please, before midnight: Sign our petition to draft Rep. Ruben Gallego to the US Senate! Our Democratic majority depends on it! ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/draft-gallego-22/?source=VPP_20221209_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=9&akid=5797%2E878179%2EBBlNz0)

clean_body: Disenfranchised Disenfranchised | The people who were disenfranchised, the people who care about their elections, who care about their voice being heard, were given two minutes to speak and air their grievances. Meanwhile, these clowns running our elections had two weeks to count the votes. God did not put us in this fight because we are weak. We're living in difficult times, and he put the right people here just for this moment. | -Team Lake -

body:

I'm fed up with Joe Biden's big government, socialist agenda.

**He gave us $3.5 trillion in new spending ...

72,000 pages of new business-killing regulations...

And, 87,000 new IRS agents.**

These disastrous policies have caused record high inflation and left countless Americans struggling to get by. **Biden 's answer to our economic woes? _More government and less freedom._**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053045:6d4mQVGXN:m:1:3253819041:977E45D536AF577FA7BD6121301D4427:r)
---

**We cannot abide by this socialist insanity one second longer - we must STOP Joe Biden.**

That's why I'm working with conservatives at every level of government to hinder Biden's socialist agenda and hold him accountable for the damage he's done.

---

Thank you for your commitment to America and to the conservative movement. I wish you the best in these difficult times.

You are what makes America great.

Fighting For Our Future,

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Peter, can I trust you with this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hi Peter. It's Steve Scalise again.
I emailed you a couple times asking for your feedback because I know you're someone I can trust. You might not have seen my messages because I didn't see your response come through yet.
_That's okay because it's not too late!_
[**I just need to hear back from you by 11:59 PM or I'll be forced to close down the survey without your response included. This survey will guide our _entire agenda_ in the first weeks of the new Congress, so this is not something to take lightly. Can you please complete my Majority Leader Survey by the end of the day?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053186:JXR4QVGNG:m:1:3331421248:27CEEF8DB839FF19925816FF60CEB843:r)
I'm only asking a few short (but important) questions. This survey won't take long -- I promise.
Your help is greatly appreciated!
Thank you,
Steve Scalise
_Republican Majority Leader-elect_
* * *
**Hi patriotPeter -- It 's Majority Leader-elect Steve Scalise.** I'm looking for critical feedback before the next session of Congress begins and you're someone I know I can trust.
[**Will you take just 2 minutes of your time to answer my brand new Majority Leader Survey?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053186:JXR4QVGNG:m:1:3331421248:27CEEF8DB839FF19925816FF60CEB843:r)
**Here 's some of the things I need advice on:**
_Should a Republican Congress focus MORE or LESS on stopping Critical Race Theory in Schools?_
_Should a Republican Congress COMPLETE the Southern Border Wall?_
**[COMPLETE THE MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY NOW ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053186:JXR4QVGNG:m:1:3331421248:27CEEF8DB839FF19925816FF60CEB843:r)**
Time is of the essence. Republican leaders like myself only have a few more days to put together our playbook of ideas for the upcoming Congressional session.
_In other words: help me help you!_
[**Please, take just 2 minutes to answer some of the most important questions I 've ever asked you before I meet with my top colleagues and Team Scalise to review your responses.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053186:JXR4QVGNG:m:1:3331421248:27CEEF8DB839FF19925816FF60CEB843:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053186:JXR4QVGNG:m:1:3331421248:27CEEF8DB839FF19925816FF60CEB843:r)
**Steve Scalise**
_Republican Majority Leader-elect_
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5gj4dn0thgsgrur9m10gcnj8saidpi9dqiuhps0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmecqjeob3m5inao766cr64cdnmphncptjcdjr5crlmdojfcdhmdhb6pj7miq60puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccbn6dhm0sjgcoq65cr0cuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o36c1h2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z57v2d97grbg078ago10jmmnrqi00hfvu217u2d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o36c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs22fh5j32upbku07gvqdgr1rk6elbl8ubc2pra8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o36c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdb31obqc2ab5keus5ubb63b1uetq4i90sdquh7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o36c1h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zg8ltc2cmr17a0fcsmiu7039s0o8vc83ri7ja0vo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl885ik40ecn3bk2cogi4vpmuavn4vit6t2e9joo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o36c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Your America
subject: Euclid for YOU!
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7588%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=KXjH0i%2bglRNO6WMFtjJymA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96948%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wuXH837Ej8%2fuwZ%2b9cz0BXw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96949%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oxKw2NbTlflOwzIpm3Z04A&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96940%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fjOMixGVGXTTQkiD%2bXhEJg&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7588%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=KXjH0i%2bglRNO6WMFtjJymA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7588%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=KXjH0i%2bglRNO6WMFtjJymA&sysid=1)

I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zstqe6fo4ge2escr37ru55mg0p2r995iuu8urtbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrrrjud24iov5h91cfrkdb03vmf013jcpg6edpko_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv4iio7s3aq4lj2rl2e2l7np3efl69pdqcb6q578_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq7f3u7hujr6vubtncgv6u3pk52f32e0v7co6r58_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrgnkkt30bn2jjebmkp4tklbfb8t7kf7751fgt6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgp5ipba3b316qb7hvmroh4qce5qgs0n4mpl8hpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfkr6q73fk3gr0s1nv3asn4b642fsub6r7kqs0no_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb9nu5v26resbbid2tf6o76dbtu86cn5envub568_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z10ucba03dgslvg3h542eqg1t82idlj7l4vhs2og_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcgqdnao1e27dvgc77mfk2720rm94g34s2264tl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5qn3ao7lo18qbs3ln17pulhfoicdqlfte4s2l0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ng6bdelj7mbjm3fpspckdlfu9dvq88f3rkj3pg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9jhanvtoorat0spu9uf7o5bo3abu318nbai6i1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0f9sopqf207q53qefu3cmgd7sisq8fjm4i61930_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs925mmqe4pmmqr34h4rk6lvf5an3b49antoa2r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9ecnbbld66s4k2v6kq52lm6m01s2fsoo2bkpi6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7a6ilpesmb7219fqh6bgt23hd5e2qjapmuqvci8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpt640e5arruefeh38l7t8o1pp6aqcfrka8glqbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32chh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zg82r7c7p2mja96dqc5v01961g33drfi3ce60ab8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq590qrb4ma1q65u2u4mn92r0uesiav3m7877m3g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c1hmeo30c9i649fg)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdt9nedjiqvd8p2i6fcmilrfv3rt62e9i3rc5ntg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8g43f8lamcm15j8jb57b420h99bbu2p8koo5a50_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32cjh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqpqk1jja9danjubjmhm9bfj1ed1j6l2ipacstpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32cjh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztaco5cjs31267cq8j8lkgqs3h2h37elkf972aoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32cjh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zngg56n3gep3r9u47gr94ai9g7qmu50cnkaljpfo).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgsnge63et1st829qobtc97fcv2inal8v0kehgu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o32cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7bkggdiqgusu5rtihofvfm80a5cl1qfi5c8fu2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o36c5h2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztjcj7hjqvfmbdihp76tssnsr06dm7i25mabf1jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o36c5h2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4l3qv0q2f8uk7h09ivfut6tgu67sdf4uhostv4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o36c5h2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zljnpo2s40608hksrecl4qn83vrsjqvra8op10d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o36c5h2bs)

name: American Update
subject: Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy?
body:
| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42204%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LbieHcgfeki%2fEEZOIX8Z%2bg&sysid=1) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And [what she’s discovered is startling. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42215%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dz8Fp%2bjsiPToM9yqAYnCcA&sysid=1) It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on ... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you - and find out what it means for your money.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42216%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EliWbs0gxnUQVG%2b3SHNbVg&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42217%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J9mp0%2fdPMOnk%2ffjcB9KLMg&sysid=1)

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z884jg1f5vkol50bavu6n7pqehfvasi2lce949ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o36cdh2bs)

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5q6bcf6ok9llg9jnl8k3rtue77uojck2ao35sdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o36cdh2bs)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9h513q8brpgakelbdg86o29es6otf6qf1okl31g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o36cdh2bs)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zseqhmueqldph96g586nfsvu3n5b2nbtcl8imtqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm0o36cdh2bs)

And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.” So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them! If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too. That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court. I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking. Thank you! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil. He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Have you seen what they’re doing to our kids?
body:
We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help t
| | | Dear Fellow Conservative, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... [**That’s why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv1gnj5hu9roc4vo9hjrhlivclil7nfpim5hbr58_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm8o72cdh2bs) We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they’re doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we’re going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that’s exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on **Laura Ingraham** ’s great **Fox News **show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter’s school and told that her daughter was now a “boy”. She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was “transgender” and “bisexual”... Her impressionable daughter didn’t even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica’s innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy’s name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a “Gender Support Plan” and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother’s knowledge! **And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn’t be “trusted”****.**
* These people are not real teachers.
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children to read...
* They’re not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic...
* They’re not concerned with teaching history...

They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent’s values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. [**That’s why I’m asking you to rush in your donation of $35 or more to help us stop these child groomers now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2lpbd51b1hnse7uv9v8l7nbigudb17krhnp14ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm8o72cdh2bs) After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and “interviewed” her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it’s happening in secret so parents, grandparents andthe community don’t know what’s going on. Jessica’s innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don’t act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit **The Ingraham Angle** , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It’s horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That’s why our lawsuit names the individual “teachers” -- we must hold **them** accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... [**So please, join me today with a donation of $35 or more to fund our lawsuit to protect our kids from out of control leftist teachers.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zree88e4sr4m06659vsg1hd6tgmf8n5052bopdbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm8o72cdh2bs) But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today – $50, $100, $250 or more – I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don’t just file lawsuits – we **WIN** them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we’re fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we’re going to make them pay for their actions... [**So please, join the fight today****with your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6m13kc89k74m1t3t1dbvoka458kkrg2jm4ebbk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjm8o72cdh2bs) We’re ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can’t do it without you. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon

subject: [Bombshell] New Hunter Evidence
body:
Help us expose the truth about Hunter's involvement with the Obama State Department!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053051:6yhisVGON:m:1:3253819041:B2D84EC396CF9142A6A934218D167424:r "USJF") Peter: I want to send you a quick update on our FOIA lawsuit for State Department's documents pertaining to Hunter Biden. We had our first court hearing the other day and the Biden officials continue to fight against the release of documents related to Hunter Biden that we requested over two years ago! The court case is heating up and while the judge made some favorable rulings, we still don't have the documents and will need to ramp up our efforts to win this case! We're battling the Biden-controlled federal government which has an unlimited budget and will do everything in its power to delay the court case, especially when they know they'll ultimately lose. In short, the Biden Administration is hoping to bleed us dry in the process before we can expose the truth about Hunter's involvement with the State Department! **[You can help us continue the fight... but it means we need your $25, $50, or $100 donation today so we can see this fight to the end and finally force the Biden Administration to release the documents exposing Hunter's actions!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053051:6yhisVGON:m:1:3253819041:B2D84EC396CF9142A6A934218D167424:r "You can help us continue the fight... but it means we need
your $25, $50, or $100 donation today so we can see this fight to the end and finally force the Biden Administration to release the documents exposing
Hunter’s actions!")** It's no secret that they're scared of what we might uncover. Just look at what's already been exposed in their dealings with Twitter over the Hunter Laptop story. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053051:6yhisVGON:m:1:3253819041:B2D84EC396CF9142A6A934218D167424:r "Headline")**Elon Musk showed exactly what we suspected all along - the Biden team worked overtime to make sure no one knew about Hunter's Laptop before the 2020 election!** They even got the FBI to claim that it was "Russian disinformation." Makes you wonder what the Big Guy is so worried about! That's why we can't let up now! America deserves to know how the Obama State Department helped enrich the Biden family. **[You deserve the truth! Will you chip in $50, $100, or $500 TODAY and help us win this case so America can know the truth?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053051:6yhisVGON:m:1:3253819041:B2D84EC396CF9142A6A934218D167424:r "You deserve the truth! Will
you chip in $50, $100, or $500 TODAY and help us win this case so America can know the truth?")** The potential smoking gun against Hunter is within reach. That's why the State Department is trying to run out the clock on us! That's why I'm reaching out to you. We've got them on the ropes, but we need to keep punching up against the behemoth forces at the U.S. Justice Department. But we're only going to know the truth if we win this case. **[Will you step up and help us force the State Department to release the documents? Please donate today and help us make history!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053051:6yhisVGON:m:1:3253819041:B2D84EC396CF9142A6A934218D167424:r "Will you step up and help us force the State Department to
release the documents? Please donate today and help us make history!")** Thank you,
James V. Lacy
President, U.S. Justice Foundation

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas!
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0tp3r12aiaif3ev05bogv410pnt9kpgl8p4ljm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjmaob0c3h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq794f7acc94bhgtfl1g7rdsbotk9hkgnut2m7i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjmaob0c3h2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo4ro6naol1mjmnp7uti3do506u2ooopb3u13djg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjmaob0c3h2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z83s763m08qs7fkrofuehvkmv5fq09jt5uf6ilv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjmaob0c3h2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zohitvfq47qp0fi1c0dkqo0bgleqsps2809u2kbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjmaob0c3h2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm3ps3671gko6hgi2r81c81d6omn3dccrpe04i20_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjmaob0c3h2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqbgitpc1g5mlf0co9m61vl7h4vacdnh5st2dado_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjmaob0c3h2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z83ibegvjojc0q7icpsige3i1j3ovih7i1rhmdt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjmaob0c3h2bs)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsahdohfi69bo4pbcubfub44jn6n4mpu18o7gd28_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjmaob0c3h2bs)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2022
body:
As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6i72b2f649oilrohdanebrotttjsl9f81hler4g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdj6mq7fctjc2o6cpjmm6oedchieurrcp74clhb4d34mkp36ohkmljrcp1l69g6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32tpjcdg74tb66lib6o37m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmeo33ctim2p30c8iv0)
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z01a9o4jml730lquhntt5pnuieu77qsqfc081op0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjmaob4c1h2bs). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ziitae4vgbco3pk1d7qka7no2d5hl67d54hm90ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjmaob4c1h2bs) **These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsn766q2vdu8qf4cf68ujqelb6a25q4de5465m20_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjmaob4c1h2bs) when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: [**You get $273 worth
of FREE gifts!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq6560h8bab7vppbtfhftlmvbr8g9hb82dq5lsuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdjmaob4c1h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. name: Great America Update
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7507%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=uhOHno0cHAQBpQJfnNko8g&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77326%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I7Ig%2fgFcnVQODVEDUidZkQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77327%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FQOn3ITjlwgCgPlc2va5BA&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77328%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8V9KW552aXV2mD9JHUA1Lw&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77329%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LtvloTdgqabVbX1WH1WkIQ&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7507%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=uhOHno0cHAQBpQJfnNko8g&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7507%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=uhOHno0cHAQBpQJfnNko8g&sysid=1)
