name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Having an election denier as the next attorney general of Arizona—a state that’s been ground zero for Republican attacks on democracy—would be a disaster. We must make sure GOP Attorney General candidate Abe Hamadeh isn't able to prevail in the Arizona statewide recount, where he currently trails Democratic Attorney General-elect Kris Hayes.
body:
Open recount in Arizona
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6ad914d-25eb-4492-b40f-8c15a0fa4baf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **_As you might have seen, there’s one more Big Lie supporting, anti-democracy election denier left whom we must stop._** We didn't only turn the red wave into a blue crush, but we defeated almost every one of the loudest election deniers running in 2022. We did it because voters and donors like you stepped up all over the country to make sure Republicans had to press hard for every inch of ground. We conceded nothing without a fight. [_**But, to finish the job, we must make sure GOP Attorney General candidate Abe Hamadeh isn't able to prevail in the Arizona statewide recount about to begin, where he currently trails Democratic Attorney General-elect Kris Hayes. This is why your support for the Democratic Attorneys General Association is critical at this time.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T05620fe1-99e1-4b43-b93e-1b0251ccb20c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Arizona has been ground zero for Republican attacks on democracy. Kari Lake not only refuses to concede, but still spits out lie after lie about "election fraud" that doesn't exist. **Ruby-red Cochise County, AZ had to be sued by current Secretary of State and Governor-elect Katie Hobbs to force them to submit their vote tallies, as they denied a fair election took place by presenting zero evidence and a whole lot of conspiracies.** A second county, Mohave, also initially refused, until the threat of arrest forced the Republican commissioners to back down. _ __And, of course, Hamadeh himself is spewing every conspiracy theory he can conjure up, damaging the faith Arizonans, and all Americans, have in our democratic process._ __So we must be ready for Hamadeh's team to pull out every trick, including trying to alter and/or destroy ballots, engage in ridiculous lawsuits, propaganda and even intimidation--anything they can think of, legal or otherwise--to try and wrest the election away from the 99% certain winner after a legitimate recount, Kris Mayes._
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: No election deniers for attorney general**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T677774bd-2736-408f-84d8-2f09ca26976e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | _We can't make Hamadeh have an ounce of class or respect for the Democratic process and shut his mouth. But we can make sure he isn't able to find a way to illegally or unethically win this election, so he can spout this trash while serving as the highest ranking law enforcement office in Arizona._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Democratic Attorneys General Association (DAGA) so they can use these resources to make sure there is a fully aboveboard recount and the legitimate winner--Kris Mayes--ascends to the position of Arizona Attorney General?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5dd7991b-d315-485d-b76a-44e922931c4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We know fighting these ghouls is exhausting, and **so appreciate** your standing with Blue Amp Action in this fight. Thanks!
---
Cliff

---
|
---
| | |
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Ted Corcoran
subject: 6 hours and 275 miles
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Activists and community leaders gathered in Raleigh, NC earlier this week to bring attention to the dangers of the “independent state legislature” theory.

[**But the danger doesn’t stop in North Carolina. The decision in _Moore v. Harper_ could impact every one of us. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55780244/382808455/1243905992?source=20221009_AOTL_C_mvh4_ActivesSigners&refcode=20221009_AOTL_C_mvh4_ActivesSigners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwM2FkZGYyLTkyNzgtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvlBxCO5x8PBziNE3C8ItepWN82QFpcI4Oor_zG-JvM=)

That’s why we got on a bus and drove 6 hours and 275 miles to D.C. We were on the steps of the U.S. Supreme Court during oral arguments -- because we believe our voices should matter.

I’m asking you to fight with us North Carolinians and reject this fringe theory.

**[Will you sign the AOTL petition to protect checks and balances?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55780245/382808465/-1462679232?refcode=20221009_AOTL_C_mvh4_ActivesSigners&source=20221009_AOTL_C_mvh4_ActivesSigners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwM2FkZGYyLTkyNzgtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvlBxCO5x8PBziNE3C8ItepWN82QFpcI4Oor_zG-JvM=&emci=c8905bd6-fc77-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=003addf2-9278-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045)**

Becky Harper, the North Carolina voter named in Moore v. Harper, spoke at our rally in Raleigh. She said, **“Voting matters. Everyone’s vote should count the same.”**

We can’t let a fringe group of partisans throw away our checks and balances. We can’t let them throw our elections into chaos.
**[Will you chip in a few dollars to support All On The Line’s mission to protect voting rights nationwide?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55780246/382808472/1243905992?refcode=20221009_AOTL_C_mvh4_ActivesSigners&source=20221009_AOTL_C_mvh4_ActivesSigners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwM2FkZGYyLTkyNzgtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MvlBxCO5x8PBziNE3C8ItepWN82QFpcI4Oor_zG-JvM=)**

As a father and a veteran, I’ve done a number of important things in my life. But speaking on the steps of the Supreme Court this week -- defending the right to vote -- is near the top of the list.

Thank you for all you do in this fight.
\-- Ted

Ted Corcoran
Organizing Director

clean_body: | Activists and community leaders gathered in Raleigh, NC earlier this week to bring attention to the dangers of the “independent state legislature” theory. = That’s why we got on a bus and drove 6 hours and 275 miles to D.C. We were on the steps of the U.S. Supreme Court during oral arguments -- because we believe our voices should matter. I’m asking you to fight with us North Carolinians and reject this fringe theory. Becky Harper, the North Carolina voter named in Moore v. Harper, spoke at our rally in Raleigh. She said, “Voting matters. Everyone’s vote should count the same.” We can’t let a fringe group of partisans throw away our checks and balances. We can’t let them throw our elections into chaos. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = As a father and a veteran, I’ve done a number of important things in my life. But speaking on the steps of the Supreme Court this week -- defending the right to vote -- is near the top of the list. Thank you for all you do in this fight. \-- Ted Ted Corcoran Organizing Director All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg6vashudh5kd7r5ev8a638b94gq2av36hojbup8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge0o76cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zofovdk2rqb69na7n9aohq6b2cknnvftr7qboeu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge0o76cth2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z21ft6tv6o5529b8kej80n134vi062tpl1q5gito_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge0o76cth2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: U.S. Marine illegally arrested by FBI gets 8 months in prison
body:
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7597%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=eE%2fBukGWMD6CibAd9mEf%2fg&sysid=1)

He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. | | | [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96943%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ITuv5hcEAcAHnSgf4fPxVw&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96944%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CnHHL%2flARknXrWF2NRa4qQ&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96055%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9lqyNxWM%2bzci2at32XLDxQ&sysid=1)**

(Because you’re a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you’ve seen some of this information before...it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn’t protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn’t attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn’t receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden’s Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What’s more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I’ve locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She’s a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She’s the absolute worst judge I’ve appeared before in 45 years.

And now she’s throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**Patriot, I’ve filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera - and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
I’m suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus’ home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.

I’m using two powerful class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: How We Win
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0266%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=XPUEM45dwGbOg22LY7Qa%2fA&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42219%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uG6fe%2fVkOWXhuU%2bdT26R5w&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42219%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uG6fe%2fVkOWXhuU%2bdT26R5w&sysid=1)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42210%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lhc%2ft6lDxlFbyPVC3OTd2Q&sysid=1)
---
[Get my book](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42211%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yIdBNCTMJu%2fMnyLYBu7pvw&sysid=1)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42212%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pu%2fJxGhzjmRSSyfpTRxiEg&sysid=1) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42213%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fa8WS1HoV9snKKhY4TF3Cw&sysid=1)
---
[Get my book](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42211%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yIdBNCTMJu%2fMnyLYBu7pvw&sysid=1)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42214%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bw65KXZHaeazrTFCO34AEw&sysid=1)
---
| | [Get my book ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42225%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HLMvCmrG6kZw8j5W4P8iAA&sysid=1)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0266%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=XPUEM45dwGbOg22LY7Qa%2fA&sysid=1)_

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden’s Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What’s more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I’ve locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She’s a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She’s the absolute worst judge I’ve appeared before in 45 years.

And now she’s throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

I’m suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus’ home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. body:

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9souor6qh0r8193a8lk055t0r4dv06heq705mi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge4or6clh2bs)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

Last week, our team sent out a [**priorities survey**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55787642/382839025/-163849329?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OThiMjM4Ny05Zjc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3eXFPLa5t67fzBv2aWyXZ3N649MILQvsct7feOnKVRw=&emci=bec17f08-1077-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=898b2387-9f78-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=13185894) so you could share with Chris and the rest of our team what issues you would like to see him tackle once he is sworn into Congress.

[**There’s still time to submit your response to our survey, and we’d love to hear from you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55787644/382839027/-163849329?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OThiMjM4Ny05Zjc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3eXFPLa5t67fzBv2aWyXZ3N649MILQvsct7feOnKVRw=&emci=bec17f08-1077-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=898b2387-9f78-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=13185894)

You were an integral part in helping us elect Chris, and your support is so important as we prepare for Chris to be sworn into Congress. **[Taking the time to share your thoughts with us will help Chris do the best job possible representing western Pennsylvania, so will you please take a moment to share your priorities with our team?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55787645/382839029/-163849329?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OThiMjM4Ny05Zjc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3eXFPLa5t67fzBv2aWyXZ3N649MILQvsct7feOnKVRw=&emci=bec17f08-1077-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=898b2387-9f78-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=13185894)**

Thank you,

name: American Action News
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcbnpga952llt8i1hqqlf0gu8dh8bnt8q75q61o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge4or6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za5dnulbkk89audm5oa2ul2jvojbvfm2bv685iig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge4or6clh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkbm9jnecqom595hmapgc4e26vh7ivfmfg2hkjqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge4or6clh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za1mfc2hk6m09se5l59lsa7ai5bm9smnf5mn55lo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge4or6clh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: ConservativeFWD
subject: Biased fact-checker strikes PragerU
body:
PragerU needs your support to educate millions of young people about what’s really at stake—Freedom of Speech and Freedom of
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdgkbpf61inacc00iqvtna183ctq26gvso248big_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge0o72c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u1pjdcrncuoraohks1h76t70m1p6fc5jc4pjac9gsqor2p9h69ib0slic5orfdtnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhespm6ptnc1j3co5jchjr1db5e8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zh6nml1ul6ohmpj0l0v8vbq252fhoage9ok4cpqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge0o72c3h2bs)
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztbpes65b1eecc58uv69qc8eap9mdgqhllbspfrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge0o72c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear PragerU Supporter, Big Tech's campaign to silence PragerU never sleeps. Last year video hosting company JW Player refused to renew our contract to host videos--on PragerU's own website! Later, we found out who was responsible for JW Player dropping PragerU as a client...online "fact-checker" NewsGuard. NewsGuard calls itself "The Internet Trust Tool." It supposedly rates news websites for credibility and transparency. Even though PragerU is an educational nonprofit--not a news website--NewsGuard rated us anyway! **[Give Today to Help STOP Fact-Checkers from Censoring PragerU!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zrjcmg8nc4qulkfm2g1coq2f8qehmi45ivfa6ra0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge0o72c3h2bs)**
---
**PragerU 's scorecard (57 points out of 100) warning viewers to "proceed with caution":**
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2ge8otlb53oojst3r0jfurukhq74ap72qg76fp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge0o72c3h2bs)
---
| | Corporations, social media companies--even libraries--handsomely pay these third-party online nannies to label anything the left disagrees with as "fake news." Hiding behind fact-checkers, they then deplatform or censor organizations like PragerU...taking zero responsibility for censorship! **[Please give today to help educate Americans about this insidious new threat!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zktsg4gr1c723unrjdjo6qc6mdmld7k92nuidqeo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge0o72c3h2bs)** Upon learning of our abysmal rating that led to JW Player dropping PragerU as a client, PragerU CEO Marissa Streit contacted NewsGuard. **_" I am writing today to bring your attention to an urgent matter that I assume is a mistake by NewsGuard. Sadly, this mistake is damaging PragerU's reputation and costing our nonprofit millions of dollars."_ ** **-- Marissa Streit, PragerU CEO** Marissa spoke with NewsGuard executive Eric Effron. He assured her that NewsGuard is unbiased and protects Americans from disinformation. Curiously, Eric didn't seem to know much about PragerU (even though NewsGuard had already given us a bad rating). Over the next month, NewsGuard asked PragerU questions under the guise of improving our score. NewsGuard inquired about everything from why we don't publish our donors' names (which we would NEVER do) to our perspectives on COVID-19 and Planned Parenthood. Regardless of the facts and sources PragerU provided, our score wasn't changed. They never intended to be fair. Clearly, NewsGuard simply thinks our values and ideas shouldn't exist online. **[Support PragerU to help stop Big Tech censorship!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvqs87mbr923kf3lrmfaptkbn52hlfvsgdo1o2bo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge0o72c3h2bs)** **_" The chain of emails we've exchanged with you and your team has exposed your organization for what it is--an online media bully run by wealthy left-wing activists pushing their agenda."_** **-- Marissa Streit, PragerU CEO** This reality is...fact-checkers like NewsGuard are the political elite's tool for censorship. Funded by giant corporations protecting their power and bottom lines, these self-appointed "Arbiters of Truth" are determining what is true and what is false. **Is this the America you want to live in? **
---
[**Donate Now**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7o2koob3p4g6nf3mo2l4atgku36gvdf3q2jnh78_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge0o72c3h2bs)
---
| | **PragerU is exposing NewsGuard and other fact-checkers for what they are...authoritarian oligarchs who monetized censorship to keep YOU from learning the facts and thinking for YOURSELF. ** PragerU needs your support to educate millions of young people about what's really at stake--Freedom of Speech and Freedom of Information. At the same time, PragerU must diversify our platforms and develop alternative technologies to ensure Big Tech tyrants can't silence patriotic voices. This is a time consuming and expensive endeavor! We need our loyal supporters to stand by us and give generously. We cannot do this alone. **[Please give today to keep our videos reaching and changing millions of young minds!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn116knv4hrc0vio9s2e6979q02qdg83jtbouti0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge0o72c3h2bs) ** Your PragerU Team
---
[**Donate Now**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zovvk53ns9eqopm4a9mcdoqn40p0lifh3cv74pm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge0o72c3h2bs)
---
| | |
---
**Follow PragerU on Social Media**
---

name: American Briefing
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za256kkg5bkpifjopp35mjjn5q81b8k56hv6200g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge6oj4clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdd98ud03bs2dn2akugp5t250nkqrg60q8lu3nl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge6oj4clh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztslm2091itpuoe9o7u0tgdq2du9qfe6d6pn6r2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge6oj4clh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd6s55sesreasqvsjbc097pchbc9eeqfoll9j52o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge6oj4clh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6n7umq84kse3apsjlnkkkfju0jn8jdv8hubnl70_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge6oj4clh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanbriefing.com/prefs/9z2ze3vlpu8rbdl6efb2kp1kn7vmo1otv76k043qbr0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zosdfrk9fjhn1l5vm70omtc6rfcsg3epsrtd5ac8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge6oj4clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: How We Win
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas! [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7583%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2bzkEbzxpCHZMbEMXYCSK6g&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96051%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Nz%2bFb4e4LBHEV8fzsKYdUQ&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96051%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Nz%2bFb4e4LBHEV8fzsKYdUQ&sysid=1)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96052%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZpmZI0POhSugfRNDE7eP0w&sysid=1)
---
[Get my book](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96053%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e1p7Fd60qQJHk6wG%2fuIK2A&sysid=1)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96054%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A3FB4iDiP%2bq4zs3n%2fdTT9A&sysid=1) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96065%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=INrgD10cGQetT%2buDGymabg&sysid=1)
---
[Get my book](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96053%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e1p7Fd60qQJHk6wG%2fuIK2A&sysid=1)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96066%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sBxs%2fZsXzRliTJf2xgwUKA&sysid=1)

clean_body: I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas! | | | Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win \-- just in time for Christmas! While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... ...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of How We Win to be so URGENT and so IMPORTANT that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible. How We Win is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will FIGHT for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. How We Win is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come. And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America... ... we're DOING IT! With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. | | For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqquum6v80thvp3afeoluhdua85kbqssamofrnk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o32c5h2bs)

| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcnctig1covpc02j7fuauf4s8tg7dd9b6dactoa0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o32c5h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh2skitieejo78b0bub53pc0soagprndaetuj0q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o32c5h2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z21kbqiti7e8imeqmnvn6olomc0jss5s301dhl8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o32c5h2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbo0ktk4u1eir5m9aaiaairl8pc1ggd9mu4v5gr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o32c5h2bs)

name: American Update
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0269%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=0FYYBDARgNtIZzkkezWniw&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42227%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gz7AetnZ2%2fu8H5ofj3InrQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42228%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fnQp%2bQloiReW5Y9%2b3Lol9g&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42229%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Los11CNN3CcNRkoq3LEYWg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42220%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k7Q1dvx88B%2bHVgNsljqxig&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0269%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=0FYYBDARgNtIZzkkezWniw&sysid=1)_

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1a5nf3hhn3em19ogrg5buqrs20lal6tki5c2eo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge9o74c3h2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1lh2kpkqjepsk24c8pih9pmu6h5t34cvchfaqh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge9o74c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv1hef7kt2vjn3r82pi23lefmu72g2pb6t0ejs7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge9o74c3h2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4u1komcc1s6bvn19k1u2p9k4a0djibgsciclgeo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge9o74c3h2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Team Sinema
subject: Before the year ends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#

Friend, Today marks 3 weeks until the end of 2022 and our final FEC end-of-quarter deadline. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk.
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6heo92alp8t32g76nfm7p6m04f4dljse1co3c3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdie8or6cdh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkgbku44d8oeectcjjbc6h5qsi2949ir08sdroso_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdie8or6cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0h0fab5dduucluj39dakomqnfhbssqnthnpdk58_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdie8or6cdh2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg14v1d6uk19nl0iglc3gg69aoi2p0i3ivsrkvo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdie8or6cdh2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Stop me if you've heard this one before:
Democrats in Washington are pursuing a political witch hunt investigation against Donald J. Trump...
This time, Peter, the latest episode in the never-ending, 'Never Trump' saga involves the Justice Department airing their political grievance against DJT by siccing an Obama prosecutor and husband of a major Democrat donor on him!
They're not even trying to hide the bias - Merrick Garland ADMITTED they're going Trump for one reason... Because he announced he's running for President again!
That's why I'm calling for Republicans to fight back against this EXPLICITLY political exercise by using the power of the purse.
If we want to show voters that we actually have a spine, then we should DEFUND this latest installment of the B.S. phony witch hunt against the leader of our party!!!

clean_body: DEFUND the Trump Investigation! | | | | == | I'm Calling on Republicans to DEFUND the Trump Investigation!!! Stop me if you've heard this one before: Democrats in Washington are pursuing a political witch hunt investigation against Donald J. Trump... This time, Peter, the latest episode in the never-ending, 'Never Trump' saga involves the Justice Department airing their political grievance against DJT by siccing an Obama prosecutor and husband of a major Democrat donor on him! They're not even trying to hide the bias - Merrick Garland ADMITTED they're going Trump for one reason... Because he announced he's running for President again! That's why I'm calling for Republicans to fight back against this EXPLICITLY political exercise by using the power of the purse. If we want to show voters that we actually have a spine, then we should DEFUND this latest installment of the B.S. phony witch hunt against the leader of our party!!! | | == | | | == | == | | | A political rival being targeted FIRST with late-night Gestapo raids and NOW with explicit political witch hunts is what we see in the poorest Third World countries on Planet Earth... It is NOT what we should be seeing in the United States of America! Take it from someone who's pretty familiar with these partisan persecutions... The solution to this attack is NOT sitting idly back as America is converted into Rwanda. The solution is doing everything we can to FIGHT BACK! That means using our new power in Congress to HALT all the cash that's being sent to fund the Regime's one-millionth attempt at taking out President Trump. == | | == | | [[$10]](==) | | [[$25]](==) | | [[$47]](==) | | [[$100]](==) | | [[ANY AMOUNT]](==) | Thanks for taking a stand, | == | Matt Gaetz P.S. - Trump has held off every other Swamp attack to this point thanks to ONE thing: steadfast support from patriots like YOU. == | | | | | == | == == | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk.
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaksm966hn3uuc9htuf3h700fbs6f9hjqpv0via8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o32cph2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgf3uf9oavdk0r9obpbjiudb9raniug2pg36tcog_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o32cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3v14nh0ab8pb3p1vkkuv3cbl4m4fl900rjsjp7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o32cph2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq2dm8e699sa2tdsp8dv700d47qscbasl104tp00_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o32cph2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2r6sol7v51osaocv75pbpkv7snke1qr8vlku4eg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o34clh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv3njdcmtpa80i3r8tbmho946nj2qgedq0jji0kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o34clh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpmcdrepdt37cq85m2g2hmnn0sc6cva5es3rq8po_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o34clh2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeeeteohr7ke73c5r9su5s31cjusus2h66rok9h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o34clh2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlc5i0ubu6lgr5cpt4nn5k9pqnii0morjcabg6c8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cdge1o34clh2bs)

---

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: We passed 200 bipartisan recommendations (really!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
I remain committed to fixing the broken political system.
Peter,

Too often, Congress doesn't seem to be working for the American people, and I knew things could be better. That's why these past four years, I proudly chaired the Select Committee on the Modernization of Congress, also known as the "Fix Congress Committee."

**_And I have some good news:_ The Fix Congress Committee passed 200 recommendations with bipartisan support under my leadership. You read that right -- two HUNDRED bipartisan solutions!**

Listen, there's no silver bullet to "fix" Congress. Instead, there's a whole bunch of stuff that we've got to do to modernize the institution to get it more focused on the needs of the American people.

**[Even though the Fix Congress Committee is coming to a close at the end of the year, I'm going to keep working on these issues! If you agree we need to keep up this important work to make Congress efficient, transparent, and responsive, will you add your name next to mine?](https://act.myngp.com/el/_ESJ4lYwR-d8QG_ZcsHrNBBA_AyWIlpLI3gqp1XcX9U=/dilxPTefp0eS93oHHDKDrG8C46cyEvFus2Q6TDnFZG8=?ms=em22_221210_fxcng_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&refcode=em22_221210_fxcng_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&source=em22_221210_fxcng_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221210_fxcng_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

I can't cover all 200 recommendations in one email (don't tempt me.) But here's a small snapshot of what the committee accomplished:

➡️ Brought congressional technology into the 21st century to improve efficiency;
➡️ Streamlined constituent services to improve feedback methods and help members of Congress be more responsive and accountable to folks at home;
➡️ Bolstered staff capacity to ensure Congress can do its job and enact legislation;
➡️ Made it easier to facilitate bipartisan collaboration.

And that's just scratching the surface of the recommendations we made to make government work better. We led by example -- these recommendations had the backing of a bipartisan majority.

**I 'm proud of what we've accomplished so far, and I am committed to fixing the broken political system and getting Congress back on track.**

Thanks for always being by my side. As always, it's an honor to represent you.

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/_ESJ4lYwR-d8QG_ZcsHrNBBA_AyWIlpLI3gqp1XcX9U=/eawFTdzuNKjkx834K1B8xN4VilxM2gG8tQ3c5LNY-N0=?refcode=em22_221210_fxcng_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221210_fxcng_adv_gq_act___dk_ettx&utm_medium=email)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/_ESJ4lYwR-d8QG_ZcsHrNBBA_AyWIlpLI3gqp1XcX9U=/PoxMwhaVCzx7NhBZVnwQCZBzVfwtI17LjQCH8cP2Y4k=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/_ESJ4lYwR-d8QG_ZcsHrNBBA_AyWIlpLI3gqp1XcX9U=/EviHfRaFE52HQnwx7CCERKPrbnQ7vKMxPu-8z0oj51k=)
---|---

Tacoma WA 98402 United States

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: He Lied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
For Jim Jordan to sit there and blatantly lie about it tells you everything you need to know about how he and his Republican extremists intend to conduct themselves in the Majority. They will align themselves with hate, then try to gaslight the American people about it. That’s why we need to do everything we can to hold them accountable and call out their lies for what they are: dangerous, hate-fueled rhetoric! |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55798011/382865733/950074808?refcode=E17393-20221201-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2YxYWVmOC1iNzc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQuPAZYeqLnmubzZuOmhXP4kxxzqHoSf1Ny7W2fdazY=)
Team, **During Thursday’s House Judiciary Committee hearing, I called on Judiciary GOP leader Jim Jordan to denounce his Committee’s tweet praising known antisemite, Kanye West.** Jordan, who is set to become the new Chairman of this Committee in January, responded with an outright lie claiming, “That tweet was not our account!” Well, we have receipts: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55798012/382865734/950074808?refcode=E19774-20221210-JimJordan-SB-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2YxYWVmOC1iNzc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQuPAZYeqLnmubzZuOmhXP4kxxzqHoSf1Ny7W2fdazY=) | [CALL OUT JIM JORDAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55798013/382865735/950074808?refcode=E19774-20221210-JimJordan-SB-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2YxYWVmOC1iNzc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQuPAZYeqLnmubzZuOmhXP4kxxzqHoSf1Ny7W2fdazY=)
---
This gives new meaning to the saying, “a picture is worth a thousand words.”
_The tweet was clearly sent from the House Judiciary Republicans’ official account, where it remained posted for two months before they _finally_ deleted it._
For Jim Jordan to sit there and blatantly lie about it tells you everything you need to know about how he and his Republican extremists intend to conduct themselves in the Majority. They will align themselves with hate, then try to gaslight the American people about it. **That’s why we need to do everything we can to hold them accountable and call out their lies for what they are: dangerous, hate-fueled rhetoric!**
