name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Tide turning against ‘woke’ corporations – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132700?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**This week giant fund manager, Vanguard, quit the net zero climate alliance, a group set up to impose a ‘woke’ political agenda on the rest of us.**

**Good. But what on earth was Vanguard doing signing up to this alliance in the first place?** How many of Vanguard’s clients, I wonder, signed up to have their funds used to advance a social agenda?
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9b0f1fe649&e=5703353baa)
---
**_What is ESG investing – and what we can do about it in Mississippi_**
| **Unknown to millions of Americans, many of Wall Street’s biggest fund firms have in recent years been using their financial muscle to insist that businesses they invest in adopt a social agenda.** This is sometimes referred to as ESG (or Environmental, Social and Governance) investing.

ESG investing means not only signing up to a commitment to reach net zero emission targets, but also adopting radical leftist ideology in the name of equity and inclusion. **What the radical left could not achieve via the ballot box they have come close to achieving via a thousand corporate HR departments. **

Vanguard pulling out of this climate alliance shows is that ‘woke’ corporations can be beaten. What conservatives do at a state level is proving critical in that fight.

Gov Ron DeSantis has already shown in Florida that local states can put pressure on ‘woke’ Wall Street. **Here at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we are working on legislation to limit ESG investing in our state in a way that is consistent with free market principles.**

I am delighted that Mississippi’s state Treasurer, David McRae, has taken such a strong stance, too.

**Why, I often wonder, do so many institutions go ‘woke’ in the first place? **It’s not only pressure from ‘woke’ fund firms that is the problem.

When an institution, be it a fund manager, or an ivy league university or a museum, has enormous prestige and a vast amount of money, perhaps it no longer has to strive daily to keep its customers happy?

**In an organization flush with cash, even the most mediocre managers can look better than they actually are.** Perhaps, too, when an institution starts to promote people on the basis of something than competence, the institution risks being run by the incompetent?

**I suspect that the markets, more than politicians, will eventually cause a massive correction in ESG investing - and in time in many of our ‘woke’ institutions. **

Have a great weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d266320197&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, This week giant fund manager, Vanguard, quit the net zero climate alliance, a group set up to impose a ‘woke’ political agenda on the rest of us. Good. But what on earth was Vanguard doing signing up to this alliance in the first place? How many of Vanguard’s clients, I wonder, signed up to have their funds used to advance a social agenda? | What is ESG investing – and what we can do about it in Mississippi | Unknown to millions of Americans, many of Wall Street’s biggest fund firms have in recent years been using their financial muscle to insist that businesses they invest in adopt a social agenda. This is sometimes referred to as ESG (or Environmental, Social and Governance) investing. ESG investing means not only signing up to a commitment to reach net zero emission targets, but also adopting radical leftist ideology in the name of equity and inclusion. What the radical left could not achieve via the ballot box they have come close to achieving via a thousand corporate HR departments. Vanguard pulling out of this climate alliance shows is that ‘woke’ corporations can be beaten. What conservatives do at a state level is proving critical in that fight. Gov Ron DeSantis has already shown in Florida that local states can put pressure on ‘woke’ Wall Street. Here at the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we are working on legislation to limit ESG investing in our state in a way that is consistent with free market principles. I am delighted that Mississippi’s state Treasurer, David McRae, has taken such a strong stance, too. Why, I often wonder, do so many institutions go ‘woke’ in the first place? It’s not only pressure from ‘woke’ fund firms that is the problem. When an institution, be it a fund manager, or an ivy league university or a museum, has enormous prestige and a vast amount of money, perhaps it no longer has to strive daily to keep its customers happy? In an organization flush with cash, even the most mediocre managers can look better than they actually are. Perhaps, too, when an institution starts to promote people on the basis of something than competence, the institution risks being run by the incompetent? I suspect that the markets, more than politicians, will eventually cause a massive correction in ESG investing - and in time in many of our ‘woke’ institutions. Have a great weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: During one of the biggest weeks of Democratic celebration the past few years, in a state where Democratic candidates swept the top offices, Kyrsten Sinema chose to announce she's leaving the Democratic Party to become an independent. Can you help stiffen Democrats’ resolve to finally challenge her repeated betrayals?
body:
Kyrsten Sinema’s betrayal
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1121ff2e-8c08-4f18-b857-379e9111fead/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **You probably heard yesterday, but she's made it official, KYRSTEN SINEMA HAS STABBED EVERY DEMOCRAT IN THE BACK.** **_During one of the biggest weeks of Democratic celebration the past few years—and after Arizona Democratic candidates proved to be the clear choice of the state’s voters for top offices—Sinema chose to announce she's leaving the Democratic Party to become an independent._ ** _Sinema's counting on our being scared she'll split the vote in 2024 if we run a true Democrat, that we'll sit back and take her betrayal. Don't let her do it. You win not with fear, but leadership. _ _**_Congressman Ruben Gallego is a force, a charismatic, young, progressive Latino veteran, who understands "loyalty" in a way that is alien to Sinema. He's talked about primarying her already for all her betrayals. So let's get him in the race. Not next month or next year. NOW._** _ [**_Will you join us in giving Gallego $5, $10, $25--even $50 or more if you can--so we have a huge fundraising day for Congressman Ruben Gallego in response to her betrayal, and make his decision easy? This is incredibly important, we can't begin 2023 by letting Sinema dictate the terms of our Senate majority--or she'll undercut all we hope to accomplish over the next two years._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdbabcbcf-a2f8-475e-93da-121cbe140875/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Only a response that Democrats won't be held hostage, will support Gallego with all they have while making her into a nobody by stripping her of all Senate power will get this done. She can't caucus with Republicans, or her plan to appeal to some Democrats fails. If she caucuses with nobody, she is a nobody, and we still retain our advantage (50-49-1, instead of 51-49, still enough for us to have a real majority)._
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: Stand with Ruben Gallego and the Democratic majority**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72391818-684d-4472-8f63-a146516d150e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | Even Joe Manchin didn't consult her when he cut a deal with Joe Biden in July. From CNN.com: _Democrats in the Senate know who she is, that it's not about principles or her state's lean (decidedly center left, now), but her._ **_So let's make clear right now she's not taking hostages, has no power and we'll put a real Dem in the Senate in 2024._** [**_Will you join us in giving Gallego $5, $10, $25--even $50 or more if you can--so we have a huge fundraising day for Congressman Ruben Gallego in response to her betrayal, and make his decision easy? This is incredibly important, we can't begin 2023 by letting Sinema dictate the terms of our Senate majority--or she'll undercut all we hope to accomplish over the next two years._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d2e244b-4e4d-4a9e-a35f-f7c3ccd35a46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you so much for standing for what’s right._
---
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1444fbeb-7932-443c-ae1b-c386c0372f1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

From CNN.com: Democrats in the Senate know who she is, that it's not about principles or her state's lean (decidedly center left, now), but her. So let's make clear right now she's not taking hostages, has no power and we'll put a real Dem in the Senate in 2024. Thank you so much for standing for what’s right. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Andy Beshear
subject: One year ago
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
One year ago today, our Commonwealth experienced the most severe tornado event in its history. Peter,

One year ago today, our Commonwealth experienced the most severe tornado event in its history. The destruction to our communities in the aftermath of this disaster was devastating, and one year later, we are still working to rebuild.

Today, my thoughts are with every Kentuckian who was impacted by this storm, especially the hundreds who were injured and the loved ones of the 81 Kentuckians we lost.

Kentuckians are strong, and while this was a heartbreaking tragedy, it was incredible to see how our communities came together to provide support to affected families over the last year. We've made great progress in rebuilding, but we still have a ways to go.

I am taking time to visit the communities in Western Kentucky that were hit hardest today. As your governor, I'm committed to helping every community recover and ensuring these families have the support they need as they continue to rebuild.

Thank you,

Andy

| PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
---
Andy Beshear for Governor
PO Box 4278
Louisville, KY 40204
United States

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Protecting marriage equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
This is a big deal.
| | |
---
Hi folks, I have exciting news to share:

**_The Respect for Marriage Act_, my bill to federally protect same-sex and interracial marriages, is on its way to President Joe Biden’s desk after passing in the U.S. Senate and House with bipartisan support. **

This issue is personal to me and to millions of Americans. I’m proud to have worked with Maggie Hassan in this fight for LGBTQ equality, and **[I’m hoping you can chip in to our campaigns so we can keep up our progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55780398/382809115/-653304940?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2159-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTNhZGRmMi05Mjc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-0cfrdsgSQ3VsXA0mG9NOTtrHfDqBfSHQmNTuJG3OW0=)**
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55780399/382809124/-653304940?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2159-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTNhZGRmMi05Mjc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-0cfrdsgSQ3VsXA0mG9NOTtrHfDqBfSHQmNTuJG3OW0=)
---
So much progress has been made in recent years toward achieving LGBTQ equality — but still, we see attempts across the country to take away rights for those in the LGBTQ community. Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting transgender people and LGBTQ youth.

When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Justice Clarence Thomas called for _Obergefell v. Hodges_ — the case that established nationwide marriage equality — to be “reconsidered.”

**After that, I knew that the progress toward marriage equality that we have worked so hard for was on the line, which is why the passage of the Respect for Marriage Act is so important. **

This is a big step in the right direction, but our work continues. That’s why I’m asking:
[**Please, can you chip in $3 anything you can to my campaign and to Maggie Hassan's so we can keep making strides toward full equality for everyone in the LGBTQ community?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55780400/382809125/-653304940?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2159-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTNhZGRmMi05Mjc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-0cfrdsgSQ3VsXA0mG9NOTtrHfDqBfSHQmNTuJG3OW0=)
__If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Maggie Hassan and Tammy Baldwin immediately:__

clean_body: This is a big deal. | | | Hi folks, I have exciting news to share: The Respect for Marriage Act, my bill to federally protect same-sex and interracial marriages, is on its way to President Joe Biden’s desk after passing in the U.S. Senate and House with bipartisan support. This issue is personal to me and to millions of Americans. I’m proud to have worked with Maggie Hassan in this fight for LGBTQ equality, and = | | = So much progress has been made in recent years toward achieving LGBTQ equality — but still, we see attempts across the country to take away rights for those in the LGBTQ community. Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting transgender people and LGBTQ youth. When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , Justice Clarence Thomas called for Obergefell v. Hodges — the case that established nationwide marriage equality — to be “reconsidered.” After that, I knew that the progress toward marriage equality that we have worked so hard for was on the line, which is why the passage of the Respect for Marriage Act is so important. This is a big step in the right direction, but our work continues. That’s why I’m asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Maggie Hassan and Tammy Baldwin immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much for your support. — Tammy Baldwin U.S. Senator from Wisconsin_ | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: Fiorella Bini, Team AOC
subject: First of its kind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I’m about to share with you a project that we’ve been working on that’s near and dear to my heart.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221210-3692-header&t=1&akid=3692%2E2526796%2EAueXQk)
This is Fiorella, an organizer with Team AOC. I’m about to share with you a project that we’ve been working on that’s near and dear to my heart. It’s something that no other congressional campaigns have tried before, but we are.
Let me explain.
As you may know, our district is majority Spanish-speaking and it’s very important to us to build a strong relationship and connection with our Spanish-speaking community. **We’ve also seen that Latino communities are too often the targets of disinformation, so it’s crucial that we share accurate information and resources regularly.**
So, our team put our heads together and we realized that the best way to reach these community members would **_not_** be on Twitter or traditional social media. We thought... “Hey, the average street vendor in our district is not on Twitter, _**but they might be on WhatsApp**_ ”.
So we launched Wasapea Con AOC, a WhatsApp group for Spanish-speakers in our district to share information, build community, and provide needed resources for NY-14 residents:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221210.yBUc8n&refcode=em20221210-3692-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3692%2E2526796%2EAueXQk)
When we first started it, I didn’t know what to expect or if it would take off. We began by sending out emails and texts inviting people to join and passing out flyers – and, steadily our numbers started to grow.
I knew we were on to something when I was at a community event talking to a street vendor, and when I told her my name – she recognized it from the WhatsApp group (since I regularly post in the group)! She even asked to take a photo with me to share with the group later. Here’s the photo:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221210.yBUc8n&refcode=em20221210-3692-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3692%2E2526796%2EAueXQk)
I’m proud to say that we’re up to 163 people and counting! We open the group about once or twice a week, and we always start with an icebreaker and then see where the conversation goes.
My favorite part about the group is that **it’s not just a one-way conversation – it’s a discussion space between community members**. While we certainly share what Alexandria is doing in DC, The Bronx, and Queens to help our families and about our events, I’ve seen people ask for recommendations for child care, after school programs, and more – and get answers from other community members. **Seeing people discuss issues in the neighborhood and give each other advice and resources is truly amazing.**
We also use it as a place to listen and answer questions from community members. We were getting a lot of questions like, “who should I call about __?” so we decided to put together a resource page on our website for common questions around worker and tenant rights, affordable housing, immigration, and many other topics that are important to working families.
But we have so much more we want to do, and that’s why I’m asking for your help.
**If you can, I am asking you to make a contribution to help us leverage this momentum and grow this WhatsApp group to be as big and powerful as it can be. Here’s the link to donate:**
[https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/whatsapp](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221210.yBUc8n&refcode=em20221210-3692-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3692%2E2526796%2EAueXQk)
Here’s what we have planned for the program (pending we have the resources to do it):
1. **Host a policy hours live discussion** specifically for our WhatsApp community that focuses on Latino issues including the economy and financial education. Rampant disinformation and frustration with political institutions have Latino voters moving more and more Republican, but we refuse to leave them behind. With your support, we can host more of these discussions on other topics in the future.

2. **Create a financial education toolkit** that provides further resources to assist our WhatsApp group with financial education. We know that a one-hour session isn’t enough so we want community members to have a resource for ongoing education.

3. **Get more sign ups.** With your help, we can run more Spanish-language ads, send more texts, and grow this program to reach more Spanish-speakers in NY-14.

4. **Serve as a model for distributed organizing.** If this program is successful, we hope it can be a model for other communities to provide community support, communicate regularly with their representatives, and help people get the resources they need.

We could leave the program as-is, but I want to expand it to be as big as it can be. The _only_ way we can do that is with a massive amount of staff and volunteer time, and the right resources.
**So if you can give today at the link above, it would mean the world to us**.

I’m incredibly grateful to work for Alexandria and this community. I can’t think of very many people in her position who would allow their teams to think outside the box and try new things like this. In a way, I think that this program is the epitome of what our politics _should_ be about: helping and connecting people.
I’m also thankful for the people reading this email, the people who make up this movement who are so full of heart and generosity. **We’re doing something great together**. If you can be part of it by contributing, here’s that link one more time:
[https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/whatsapp](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221210.yBUc8n&refcode=em20221210-3692-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3692%2E2526796%2EAueXQk)
Thanks for reading,
Fiorella Bini
Political Organizing Director
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221210?refcode=em20221210-3692-P_FND_EXP_MIS&t=6&refcode2=3692_2526796_AueXQk&akid=3692%2E2526796%2EAueXQk)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221210-3692-P_FND_EXP_MIS&t=7&akid=3692%2E2526796%2EAueXQk)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=3692%2E2526796%2EAueXQk) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=3692%2E2526796%2EAueXQk) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=3692%2E2526796%2EAueXQk)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=3692%2E2526796%2EAueXQk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3692%2E2526796%2EAueXQk)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=698bbe9ac1604be2b91c7652f65b881a&_e=R985rxzz0W9JHfIvCnkjKyAgcLn9aB30bppB3jjYKlbZyaP73Zi_TTrisqDezvHG4AEBE0VPh5XAyHIy31ANmMUCf2rB7zNqL39eeJcxx_VY_fadd8bT-39bBzqGgRiYoqLsVRjYlJBV-avrnpta_77Io-JQXdO_QK_ZNCxYQ55DwRoa1BmjwBtMwu-uPKRK7RVj9ckt7-_1b1Xv4by7jSQC9CaOf9MciAtCcLwomAuhrrVaVpPPtammNeYRbOPCQUVRBWh8MslERR1q55ulBCuJI_b48Dpm-dvBW7TPa7WeiZjR2E7KWUqY8_SZ14mrJCY1moavN0to6J-ZBrFRvWOlh5GHThJtzVHE7tulmy-YylFYfJ059hoI3lt8zdr-0P6V5ljC6dpwXvpjJEbNVw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=698bbe9ac1604be2b91c7652f65b881a&_e=R985rxzz0W9JHfIvCnkjKyAgcLn9aB30bppB3jjYKlbZyaP73Zi_TTrisqDezvHG4AEBE0VPh5XAyHIy31ANmMUCf2rB7zNqL39eeJcxx_VY_fadd8bT-39bBzqGgRiYoqLsVRjYlJBV-avrnpta_77Io-JQXdO_QK_ZNCxYQ55DwRoa1BmjwBtMwu-uPKRK7RVj9ckt7-_1b1Xv4by7jSQC9CaOf9MciAtCcLwomAv1pB8A6KZEelbEuUvzWOcBCLM1U4UI57eU_ylemFz6i_nLhDMQIUOJx2JDzFk85xhzg-RI3aPEsz6hrL2iMeN7rjrX1CpT6N_VFaQ6abS47knnswSmMsjRI1M2O_TiTlgXQs1Y1dyQXawDJYTT9P7uwk_zTQRthnehSjFtMhZXcg%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=698bbe9ac1604be2b91c7652f65b881a&_e=R985rxzz0W9JHfIvCnkjKyAgcLn9aB30bppB3jjYKlbZyaP73Zi_TTrisqDezvHG4AEBE0VPh5XAyHIy31ANmMUCf2rB7zNqL39eeJcxx_VY_fadd8bT-39bBzqGgRiYoqLsVRjYlJBV-avrnpta_77Io-JQXdO_QK_ZNCxYQ55DwRoa1BmjwBtMwu-uPKRK7RVj9ckt7-_1b1Xv4by7jSQC9CaOf9MciAtCcLwomAuuLIReBUmnMQljfF-THQzVsg_U6cDXNowK5ISwf7F4ZaBwkxqhl3XkZodqGER7Dv99z9y5tFl2haakeD_RSAMJykirH6QzVm5iNDREhDtYWafc24ysazgF-tbcmti8tTmGIsAGUYhqMymn0qWqnPD0dgWecAJLibXVwrSSCGb5UQ%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Hi, this is Sarah from GOP HQ. We asked a small group of trusted Patriots to submit their honest response to Steve Scalise's Majority Leader Survey and the preliminary results are in...
\+ Most respondents support ENDING funding of Critical Race Theory in schools
\+ A huge majority of respondents support finishing the WALL at our southern border
The responses so far have been extremely important in guiding the agenda for the first weeks of the new Congress. **But we also got word that some folks had more to say.**

That's why we've updated the Majority Leader Survey to ask just a few more questions that will help Congressional leaders understand how to best serve you:

body:
You won’t believe Biden’s latest excuse for not visiting the border...| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=00f7fcb76cb64e57880561e27e0758fc&_t=_RDbYMI3KOFUAIGyInhIwj7tcGGg3lNtw02QDDDlOIZ2wXuccskuXOoEruLFjfz73YX3chDcHGWMk-76doxM8xfPayLbnaOsaqjTzFFRFIg%3D)_.

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=00f7fcb76cb64e57880561e27e0758fc&_e=AQ4JRSka5o27srl_RFmtkdxGm6969LP_rfTXilQ54u4-PVpt0nOs2lqFRlYgl4f68JHT7lkMNNBdEmVv_GQrpkiXfx8N4pid5484aleglkBv4pA_EL8098EfNLc3-JfDfYPvux5bAJsEOpfEWx9KoG803tMkP1lD5JRsbrEz0hR5uocfrls0PPiFfcXHipjhiDxbjN-DkWOF3GQWBUo8nTne0lg8kfwk19FdOXmcFMdbgBYQqsyDB8qRO3kK1xxwCBFyngwmKvuUCh8aAJUVyN6oKESNkV8RoVW_pMxwDijPYu34KqlpBZ7sRz4kn7KFXJxt0nVmyxSk3iCYbcLcOMP8DYj8Ghg9Y3upjEAtwJSjFpkrUwQEv5CPYVj3kwBx)
---
| | Peter,
When President Biden announced an official visit to Arizona, for just a second, I thought he might FINALLY be visiting our southern border. Nope — According to him, he’s got _“more important things going on.”_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=00f7fcb76cb64e57880561e27e0758fc&_e=AQ4JRSka5o27srl_RFmtkdxGm6969LP_rfTXilQ54u4-PVpt0nOs2lqFRlYgl4f68JHT7lkMNNBdEmVv_GQrpkiXfx8N4pid5484aleglkBv4pA_EL8098EfNLc3-JfDfYPvux5bAJsEOpfEWx9KoG803tMkP1lD5JRsbrEz0hR5uocfrls0PPiFfcXHipjhiDxbjN-DkWOF3GQWBUo8nTne0lg8kfwk19FdOXmcFMcsBD9mcW3N4nBSib1HymFcy2I9RO40WkLXmoLlhQ2OUFykxcKTMNvZYrjBpd6zOs4XkfV1soZsORJbv_UGa-MXC1q1Z9yeX90nQh23540tvZ6cpFg3RYzekU4XM1iatr9WeGHk-5ev72v8EjGBkZeP)
---
**Our southern border is in CRISIS —**** _what could be more important than that?_** This is just another clear sign: Biden’s priorities are all wrong. He hasn’t made time to visit the southern border during his presidency, and every action he’s taken on immigration has only made the problem WORSE.

_[**If we want a secure border, Peter, we will have to fight for it ourselves.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=00f7fcb76cb64e57880561e27e0758fc&_e=AQ4JRSka5o27srl_RFmtkdxGm6969LP_rfTXilQ54u4-PVpt0nOs2lqFRlYgl4f68JHT7lkMNNBdEmVv_GQrpkiXfx8N4pid5484aleglkBv4pA_EL8098EfNLc3-JfDfYPvux5bAJsEOpfEWx9KoG803tMkP1lD5JRsbrEz0hR5uocfrls0PPiFfcXHipjhiDxbjN-DkWOF3GQWBUo8nTne0lg8kfwk19FdOXmcFMfsjK6EqLs8KGv55zzRdJ_D7PytGubqubHE6WWU-m_WjwWUZwEtyxcU3CmOO-6Z0PHr-gzXbarrU8ysKJKSWNMwIy9bg78Co3bbN-UNGUTw0JQyZHmJHzKhSHTr96LWU4EAhQvxSNLXJvhW3hTESaEK)_
---
[**> >> YES, I WILL STAND UP FOR BORDER SECURITY <<<**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=00f7fcb76cb64e57880561e27e0758fc&_e=AQ4JRSka5o27srl_RFmtkdxGm6969LP_rfTXilQ54u4-PVpt0nOs2lqFRlYgl4f68JHT7lkMNNBdEmVv_GQrpkiXfx8N4pid5484aleglkBv4pA_EL8098EfNLc3-JfDfYPvux5bAJsEOpfEWx9KoG803tMkP1lD5JRsbrEz0hR5uocfrls0PPiFfcXHipjhiDxbjN-DkWOF3GQWBUo8nTne0lg8kfwk19FdOXmcFMevEkm9j9mSTGVHqFH_xxkJDAGuMj5Y15c1InaovsMN6LC248F3yJpdpniExtwR-wvSsXk4_ZWgunlIBX7jiEvhWC7pGFwQ7v5ub37uMIZj3AfWlrLKwnyfldpsxBhNL0_TiDBFHCQUfWRt4HI0e6ar)
---
I visited the southern border myself to witness firsthand a section of the border where the wall we so desperately need abruptly comes to an end. Joe Biden shut down the construction of that wall. In doing so, he invited thousands of migrants and a steady flow of dangerous drugs and criminals to stream through the border gap that he’s chosen to leave open. _It’s a perfect illustration of President Biden’s failure._ **He created this crisis. But we have the power to fix it. ** We have the ability to once again secure our border and end the crisis of immigration. I know because that’s exactly what we achieved in four short years under the Trump-Pence administration. Advancing American Freedom even laid out the steps to fix this crisis in our Freedom Agenda. _All it takes is leadership dedicated to putting American safety FIRST. _ _Peter, do you have the will to make it happen?_ If so, I need you to chip in today to help us close the border.
---
[**SECURE OUR BORDER: $100**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=00f7fcb76cb64e57880561e27e0758fc&_e=AQ4JRSka5o27srl_RFmtkdxGm6969LP_rfTXilQ54u4-PVpt0nOs2lqFRlYgl4f68JHT7lkMNNBdEmVv_GQrpkiXfx8N4pid5484aleglkBi3MEjt064odAI9J99v0y2DCROvvCNk7rZotCgvr-wal-tLxG4kod7naUiQuLxsiclmJOzBZ-ASaUwdvc7ZGTUKYfM80Z9iA4IZWfUqRdtbH5ZPOQQ9zcX0mkjgHvdBh74AjZh1ynGmCb7bQQm2JcpNFsHjBYHBmd4YlOT8zmy53gqF4HmED9ie1Lm9NT_YjEMElHIzupd3pcGWChbnSUZiN8GfJiTCshutHLskoDXSnjfOCOlSCntbi-SIoNCR910xb3fCQ5zkZwBzCviwbPKnnkDtAvkS2nc-YpywYgckg%3D%3D)
---
[**SECURE OUR BORDER: $75**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=00f7fcb76cb64e57880561e27e0758fc&_e=AQ4JRSka5o27srl_RFmtkdxGm6969LP_rfTXilQ54u4-PVpt0nOs2lqFRlYgl4f68JHT7lkMNNBdEmVv_GQrpkiXfx8N4pid5484aleglkBi3MEjt064odAI9J99v0y2R5JRTxP3nbdqk2iyZwXHSEt8bdNo2RmB5VHtSRTUme4HG4VhldnHAPTS7K8hw6zJ4tjBvtxuV4p3tjfGNjFXCubtFhQFJB8mg1gaBmGl0WyOJz1WJgCtqhZwoEpJzFGVuwKCL1wsA023wczZmgBHAgPlnwalLbABxzz1CaqxYN3_5c7-MfHbHnf-5xWFKOGn2sSLVwfBCwLL9o1dY-d6bzpWAT3ho41XwM2ZKAGfTq-Jxv-TzEpIhReU9huaU59Ems-A3CKrBAnYREy8CBrT4w%3D%3D)
---
[**SECURE OUR BORDER: $50**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=00f7fcb76cb64e57880561e27e0758fc&_e=AQ4JRSka5o27srl_RFmtkdxGm6969LP_rfTXilQ54u4-PVpt0nOs2lqFRlYgl4f68JHT7lkMNNBdEmVv_GQrpkiXfx8N4pid5484aleglkBi3MEjt064odAI9J99v0y2xhbNxSg3ircNc_rHqZIdjC5JEzqifKfSbvE6uxfZYjGEUMZhRCNOTcoKJmsU5OjraAvWJlxp7qfpWKZPI18Vf1LSOC97RwctXXTAT1U5aHoNAJAPGmHbBVmIMc6qXZbK-XsQzLkE4SwolbjVxvVA3REfCkLMJx0grR8ekwq4bzZgQGKwcHBRCMD-Z9WgThzOcg0ThS9cr54CePnhh4XZg2JRYpB0vXUf-NcInCQorNk73VBkeJlvMFyhVIWXgO9pRsNlwCNlRLRGJnBUhj38mQ%3D%3D)
---
[**SECURE OUR BORDER: $35**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=00f7fcb76cb64e57880561e27e0758fc&_e=AQ4JRSka5o27srl_RFmtkdxGm6969LP_rfTXilQ54u4-PVpt0nOs2lqFRlYgl4f68JHT7lkMNNBdEmVv_GQrpkiXfx8N4pid5484aleglkBi3MEjt064odAI9J99v0y28Y3xcMIvUqxjuMTwR6LnK4lWoeAMXG5vuRXAMxgioN_cmkEhi5ClcjFHgDaNRKrkybSI7n1DcHZ6VDNpoSOAU77yqYN4S0CZyJLydbjYR_ep9LNV_G71_Nnj2J6I73yS9_hgWzx5h4hPuX6V-RGw8DQgdyBWYa6j92hcHOEuioxYCLMG4RvZsKWnrRAkPRe9SFoxYHTipA4ixnL79zzyMOoXTWPl_qCGAq-snzrMN2iG7-mIuW-lQXMnhD4ZmHXksyS1F_hwF6igriRbAXTjqw%3D%3D)
---
The truth is, we don’t have much time to waste. These open borders policies of today, combined with free healthcare, education, and welfare are a recipe for disaster for this country. We need strong borders to make a stronger, more secure America to protect our own people and the lives of immigrants who are exploited in the process of gaining illegal access to our nation. _[**I AGREE >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=00f7fcb76cb64e57880561e27e0758fc&_e=AQ4JRSka5o27srl_RFmtkdxGm6969LP_rfTXilQ54u4-PVpt0nOs2lqFRlYgl4f68JHT7lkMNNBdEmVv_GQrpkiXfx8N4pid5484aleglkBv4pA_EL8098EfNLc3-JfDfYPvux5bAJsEOpfEWx9KoG803tMkP1lD5JRsbrEz0hR5uocfrls0PPiFfcXHipjhiDxbjN-DkWOF3GQWBUo8nTne0lg8kfwk19FdOXmcFMdqDS7b22jBF3LkdjoW2eLzuYXURoz8V4WPVnbSkr07fuEEUmp3J7h0YZTQSBqVPWFH-capJe4R-NIEM-gOy2gH_S2YUSM26ODQEHwc19CKFKK7u7Kzh02SsZ-YUuLyYQEMBo6wStsnjADWaauklfyS)_ The only way to overcome the obvious failures of this administration is by returning to the pro-freedom policies that have worked so well before. But we can’t do it without YOU. **Will you help us hold the Biden Administration’s feet to the fire about our border crisis?**_[**Support Advancing American Freedom now.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=00f7fcb76cb64e57880561e27e0758fc&_e=AQ4JRSka5o27srl_RFmtkdxGm6969LP_rfTXilQ54u4-PVpt0nOs2lqFRlYgl4f68JHT7lkMNNBdEmVv_GQrpkiXfx8N4pid5484aleglkBv4pA_EL8098EfNLc3-JfDfYPvux5bAJsEOpfEWx9KoG803tMkP1lD5JRsbrEz0hR5uocfrls0PPiFfcXHipjhiDxbjN-DkWOF3GQWBUo8nTne0lg8kfwk19FdOXmcFMf8MhvX1eTc2MraRUErSkn6WzGw7zN8cBJXnMaf4c-0fUORhi3n-iy1oooys7n0_6rAnjB-nsZIYIRforBNzm-_glDn2HfmFGwZw3E9p0vMILbZhgH5RIKl-zSBDeANCG9maQj1MqRHIRbUMKYIC27Y)_ Thank you,Mike PenceFounder, Advancing American Freedom

We have the ability to once again secure our border and end the crisis of immigration. I know because that’s exactly what we achieved in four short years under the Trump-Pence administration. Advancing American Freedom even laid out the steps to fix this crisis in our Freedom Agenda. All it takes is leadership dedicated to putting American safety FIRST. Peter, do you have the will to make it happen? If so, I need you to chip in today to help us close the border. The truth is, we don’t have much time to waste. These open borders policies of today, combined with free healthcare, education, and welfare are a recipe for disaster for this country. We need strong borders to make a stronger, more secure America to protect our own people and the lives of immigrants who are exploited in the process of gaining illegal access to our nation. The only way to overcome the obvious failures of this administration is by returning to the pro-freedom policies that have worked so well before. But we can’t do it without YOU. Will you help us hold the Biden Administration’s feet to the fire about our border crisis? Thank you,Mike PenceFounder, Advancing American Freedom | | . | | | | | | Paid for by Advancing American Freedom Inc | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |

body:

---

Mike Pence here, did you hear the news?

_**[I have prayed over this day for a long time. I am sharing my story with the American people-the good, the bad, the blessings included. I have a special copy reserved for you. Want to hear more?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62053139:JxRALVGN1:m:1:3331703221:A630D9142B23FA01B4DB29762FE79232:r "I have prayed over this
day for a long time. I am sharing my story with the American people–the good, the bad, the blessings included. I have a special copy reserved
for you. Want to hear more?")**_
**⬇️⬇️⬇️**

---
This is the inside story of the Trump administration from its second highest official--what I said to the president and how I was tested.

I share exclusively how the faith that I embraced as a young man guided each and every decision I made at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.

**I 'm giving you a look into every second of my experiences in public service, from the early lessons to the major accomplishments.**

I will forever remain grateful for the grace of God, the love and support of my family, and the blessings of liberty that are every American's birthright.
---

If you chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, I'll send you a signed copy.

I can't wait to share this journey with you.

For Faith & Freedom,
Vice President Mike Pence

Folks,

I woke up the other morning with a funny feeling.

Something that I could feel in my bones and my ankles, from my toes, running up to my brain.

I decided to go to the doctor to find out what was the matter, and he said that I have **_Patriolitis,_** meaning **[I have chronic Patriotism for our country.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx9UU1zgyAU_DV60wFMUA8e0qbpIU17zilD4Glo-DCIceyvL5qkPbUzDMNb9i3LW6gwzREtyiIvY1ExymoQsawIIgQTjDDNMEIpLosloUjUR7YQuDhGCwSaSZUyPDDnrNUptzo-VSynDHHIGMGciWJBs7I4Ii4A8ZLzOo9VdfK-7aJsFZFNWB3w3kE6SONATCIBO4MxIMZwutlARSIb61ndGzPWAEqaJrFjyyeJbKOtgfHQKhANRNnaux4iQt0k7ALzF9IH23ppfoHe64MGIXsdMAfX7sTcA-9s7_ikd3toxjy4iZkolnRg7iBnumWymWT_tvvgWuPB-H-p88-SwSXzhEMj07afe7JlqA5GSRGK1WLcfb2U2915Bk9ShKGux_1185avsthVoh2kUrKjeUirmdOaMgpulazHKsqfIkLmNkLmOMhlP2jXf-rta3L92CUX-q6X0yV5DrsfW_hh3kXSu0US5etvvMS8uA)**

I can assure you that there are plenty of Democrats currently in office who are immune from Patriolitis because they can’t stand to see our country succeed unless there’s something in it for them.

name: To: Joe Manchin
subject: From: a DISAPPOINTED DEMOCRAT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
We’re EMBARRASSED by Joe Manchin:

FROM CNN: Joe Manchin won't budge on the Senate filibuster

Joe Manchin is totally failing us — he FAILED to protect Roe v. Wade and now he’s FAILING to pass common sense gun laws!

So we’re sending a SCATHING letter to let him know what we really think.

Sign our open letter to Joe Manchin and DEMAND he do what’s right to abolish the filibuster. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_uts_q42022_manchin-ltr?amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $1 TO SIGN THE LETTER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_uts_q42022_manchin-ltr?amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50&express_lane=true]

** SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION **

TO: Joe Manchin
306 Hart Senate Office Building
Washington D.C. 20510
From: A Disappointed Democrat
Dear Senator Joe Manchin,
I am FED UP with you turning a blind eye to just how detrimental the filibuster is to our Democratic values.
You call yourself a true Democrat, but you’ve let the GOP sabotage President Biden’s agenda at every turn by refusing to abolish the filibuster.
Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy are THRILLED that you’re doing this. They’re going to use this to rake President Biden (and every Democrat up for election) over the coals.
As a good Democrat, I’m calling you out for not supporting abolishing the filibuster and I’m calling on you to change your mind.
Plainly put, I am absolutely furious. So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $1 to help Upset the Setup elect more Democrats across the country who will actually support abolishing the filibuster. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_uts_q42022_manchin-ltr?amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $1 TO SIGN THE LETTER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_uts_q42022_manchin-ltr?amount=1&amounts=5,10,25,50&express_lane=true]
** SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION **
Sincerely,
X A Disappointed Democrat

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Dirty Deal, Sinema defects, Bernie’s War Powers Act, and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Insider News from the Political Revolution!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Dirty Deal Round 2 vs Manchin | Powering Warnock to Victory |
Sinema Defects | Bernie vs War in Yemen | Bronx Event w/ Gustavo Rivera |
Bernie Ornament | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8119?t=1011&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

Who better to embody the spirit of the season than Bernie who has given so
much to our movement. As we head into a new year, let’s remember what “Not
me, Us” is all about and move forward together.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8119?t=1012&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]When you become a sustaining member of Our Revolution for $5 or more,
we’ll send you this limited edition Bernie holiday ornament. Made of seed
paper, this makes for a unique no-waste gift!

★ ★ ★

DIRTY DEAL ROUND 2

This was a good week to be a progressive — and a bad week to be Joe
Manchin.

Not only did we diminish Manchin’s power by clinching the 51st Senate vote
with Warnock in the Georgia Runoff, but we also dealt a second blow to his
Dirty Deal.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7641?t=1013&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

Our Revolution activists jumped into rapid response this week to stop
Speaker Pelosi and House Reps from attaching the deal to the ‘must-pass’
National Defense Authorization Act.

Now, the fight has moved to the Senate, where Chuck Schumer is looking to
advance this disastrous giveaway to polluters in their version of the
NDAA. We can win again — but we need to take action immediately.

With lobbyists rushing to convince Democratic Senators to back the dirty
deal, we must show them just how many of us oppose Manchin’s selfish push
to fast-track fossil fuels and gut protections for frontline communities.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7641?t=1014&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]CALL YOUR SENATOR!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8109?t=1015&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

“We’ve got to say ‘hell no’ to any side deal that fast-tracks fossil
fuels,” Sen. Jeff Merkley said on our recent [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8076?t=1016&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]National Organizing Call.

In September, Our Revolution and our coalition fought to defeat the Dirty
Deal, making thousands of calls to pressure Congress, but we knew it
wasn’t the end.

They’re going to keep trying to push this into must-pass legislation
through the end of the year. That’s why we need you to stay vigilant as
part of our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/dirty_deal_ty/?t=1017&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Rapid Response Team and be ready to take action at a
moment’s notice.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1018&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Your support enables our team to plan ahead and make the investments
necessary to be nimble and effective. Become a recurring donor today to
strengthen our work in the fights to come.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8109?t=1019&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8109?t=1020&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

Thank you for helping Our Revolution play a decisive role in re-electing
Senator Warnock and defeating Trump's handpicked candidate Herschel
Walker!

Not only did we clinch the 51st vote in the Senate, but we also diminished
the power of Joe Manchin to obstruct the Democratic agenda.

Warnock will be a powerful voice in the Senate in the fight for voting
rights, expanding the child tax credit, and countering the influence of
far-right Republicans hellbent on moving our country backward.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8109?t=1021&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

Our Revolution staff and members made more than 4.5 million voter contacts
through Nov. 8th and the Georgia Runoff. Your support powered our direct
voter outreach to more than 150,000 Our Revolution Georgia members!

This election came down to voter mobilization, and our one-on-one
conversations with young, progressive, independent, and working-class
voters helped overcome voter suppression and lift Senator Warnock to
victory.

Add this to our list of victories in the 2022 midterms, where our movement
helped fend off a red wave, flip a Senate seat, and send 9 new
progressives to the House!

★ ★ ★

SURPRISE! SINEMA DEFECTS

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8109?t=1022&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

Kyrsten Sinema has predictably chosen to defect rather than take on
corporate power. Ironically, she calls herself independent when she’s so
clearly shackled to big money interests.

Sinema being an “independent voice” is absurd when she’s so completely
bought and spoken for. “She knows that she’s going to have a serious
challenge in 2024,” Our Revolution Campaigns Director Paco Fabian told
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8120?t=1023&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]The New Republic.

She can change her party but she won’t change her stripes. Sinema always
put the government on the side of herself and her donors, not of the
people — and that won’t change.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8109?t=1024&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

STOP THE WAR IN YEMEN

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8109?t=1025&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

Bernie Sanders is planning to force a vote on a war powers resolution
aimed at blocking U.S. support for the Saudi-led war in Yemen.

On Wednesday, Our Revolution joined a coalition of more than 100 advocacy
and news organizations to urge members of Congress to adopt Bernie’s War
Powers Resolution, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8111?t=1026&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Common Dreams reports.

“It’s been almost two months since the truce in Yemen expired, violence on
the ground is escalating, and there is still no formal mechanism
preventing a return to all-out war,” our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8112?t=1027&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]letter reads.

Shortly after taking office, Biden resumed hundreds of millions of dollars
of weapons sales to Saudi Arabia; and, in October, we supported US Rep. Ro
Khanna’s bill to cease sales.

Stay updated as this fight unfolds by following us on [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8113?t=1028&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Facebook and
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8113?t=1029&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Twitter!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8109?t=1030&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

U.S. Reps Ro Khanna and Mark Pocan teamed up with health insurance
whistleblower and Medicare for All advocate Wendell Potter to debunk the
scam that is “Medicare Advantage” in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8114?t=1031&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]The Nation this week.

“In reality, so-called ‘Medicare Advantage’ is neither Medicare nor an
advantage,” they said. “It’s actually just private insurance that uses the
trusted Medicare name to trick seniors and people with disabilities into
enrolling, then profits by denying coverage for necessary medical care.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1032&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution to keep up the fight for
Medicare for All. We must improve REAL Medicare and expand it to everyone.

★ ★ ★

2023 MARYLAND FORUM

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8109?t=1033&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

Our Revolution Maryland leader and State Del. Sheila Ruth led the
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8115?t=1034&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Forum on Legislative Priorities with five additional progressive state
lawmakers this week to gear up for 2023.

Sens. Jill Carter and Paul Pinsky, and Dels. Gabriel Acevero, Sheila Ruth,
and Vaughn Stewart discussed top action items for the year and ORMD
members’ top issues — from criminal justice reform to healthcare to
raising wages, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8116?t=1035&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Maryland Matters reported.

“Now that we have a Democratic governor, even bigger supermajorities, what
are we going to do with it?” said State Sen. Julie Palakovich Carr. “Our
responsibility is to hold our party accountable. It’s tough to challenge
your friends, especially when they happen to be your leaders.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8109?t=1036&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

BRONX NYPAN MEETING

Join Our Revolution, Bronx NYPAN for a virtual monthly event on Dec. 14th
at 8 pm ET, and meet the newly re-elected State Senator Gustavo Rivera!

This is a great opportunity to share what issues you’re most concerned
about, and what issues you think should be prioritized in the New York
State Legislature with one of our newly elected officials.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8100?t=1037&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]SIGN UP HERE

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8109?t=1038&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7641?t=1039&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

Our Revolution’s targeted campaign helped kill Manchin's dirty deal in
September and again in the US House last week.

Join us for a call storm showing the strength of our numbers demanding the
Senate now reject attaching this fossil fuel giveaway to the National
Defense Authorization Act.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7641?t=1040&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]CALL YOUR SENATOR NOW

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8119?t=1041&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

As we head into a new year, let’s remember what “Not me, Us” is all about!
When you become a sustaining member of Our Revolution for $5 or more,
we’ll send you this limited edition Bernie holiday ornament.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8119?t=1042&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]GET YOUR BERNIE ORNAMENT

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8109?t=1043&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution for just $5/mo. and get your
official membership card. For $10, get our collectible sticker 6-pack —
$15, get the stickers + a poster — $27, get both + a tote bag — $50, get
it ALL + a T-shirt!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1044&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8109?t=1045&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7070?t=1046&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=1006&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_6MU_20221210_1_1.gBjy2Z&t=1007&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed
progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of
power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_6MU_20221210_1_1.n1Ckoc&t=1008&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_6MU_20221210_1_1.wR5-3p&t=1009&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=OR_EM_NEWS_6MU_20221210_1_1.ULbFG1&t=1010&akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=3823%2E5885482%2EbiJkBr

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

Stay updated as this fight unfolds by following us on [ ]Facebook and [ ]Twitter! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] U.S. Reps Ro Khanna and Mark Pocan teamed up with health insurance whistleblower and Medicare for All advocate Wendell Potter to debunk the scam that is “Medicare Advantage” in [ ]The Nation this week. “In reality, so-called ‘Medicare Advantage’ is neither Medicare nor an advantage,” they said. “It’s actually just private insurance that uses the trusted Medicare name to trick seniors and people with disabilities into enrolling, then profits by denying coverage for necessary medical care.” [ ]Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution to keep up the fight for Medicare for All. We must improve REAL Medicare and expand it to everyone. ★ ★ ★ 2023 MARYLAND FORUM [ ][IMG] Our Revolution Maryland leader and State Del. Sheila Ruth led the [ ]Forum on Legislative Priorities with five additional progressive state lawmakers this week to gear up for 2023. Sens. Jill Carter and Paul Pinsky, and Dels. Gabriel Acevero, Sheila Ruth, and Vaughn Stewart discussed top action items for the year and ORMD members’ top issues — from criminal justice reform to healthcare to raising wages, [ ]Maryland Matters reported. “Now that we have a Democratic governor, even bigger supermajorities, what are we going to do with it?” said State Sen. Julie Palakovich Carr. “Our responsibility is to hold our party accountable. It’s tough to challenge your friends, especially when they happen to be your leaders.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] BRONX NYPAN MEETING Join Our Revolution, Bronx NYPAN for a virtual monthly event on Dec. 14th at 8 pm ET, and meet the newly re-elected State Senator Gustavo Rivera! This is a great opportunity to share what issues you’re most concerned about, and what issues you think should be prioritized in the New York State Legislature with one of our newly elected officials. [ ]SIGN UP HERE ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution’s targeted campaign helped kill Manchin's dirty deal in September and again in the US House last week. Join us for a call storm showing the strength of our numbers demanding the Senate now reject attaching this fossil fuel giveaway to the National Defense Authorization Act. [ ]CALL YOUR SENATOR NOW ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] As we head into a new year, let’s remember what “Not me, Us” is all about! When you become a sustaining member of Our Revolution for $5 or more, we’ll send you this limited edition Bernie holiday ornament. [ ]GET YOUR BERNIE ORNAMENT ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Become a sustaining member of Our Revolution for just $5/mo. and get your official membership card. For $10, get our collectible sticker 6-pack — $15, get the stickers + a poster — $27, get both + a tote bag — $50, get it ALL + a T-shirt! [ ]BECOME A MOVEMENT BUILDER ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

| Hi there,

I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my team about our 2023 Priorities Survey. As I’ve learned in the weeks since our successful election, a LOT of work goes into setting up a Congressional office – but the most important part is hearing from supporters like you about the issues you want to see me prioritize during my first term in office.

**[_Could you take a few minutes to complete our 2023 Priorities Survey?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55815665/382882348/1827776564?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjIzOGRjMi1kYTc4LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r-lAUySYGDOQm58xVJ2HXqV3Og93W-pWMbpHT9bekWg=&emci=069ec689-d877-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=5f238dc2-da78-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=750857) Your responses will be invaluable to my team and me as we determine our policy agenda for the coming year.**

Hillary

clean_body: I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my team about our 2023 Priorities Survey. | = | Hi there, I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my team about our 2023 Priorities Survey. As I’ve learned in the weeks since our successful election, a LOT of work goes into setting up a Congressional office – but the most important part is hearing from supporters like you about the issues you want to see me prioritize during my first term in office. Your responses will be invaluable to my team and me as we determine our policy agenda for the coming year. | Grateful for your input, Hillary ******Forwarded Message**** Team, With your support, last month we pulled off a historic victory and elected Hillary as the first Democratic woman to ever represent West Michigan in Congress. We’re busy preparing for the beginning of the 118th Congress, and we’re looking for input from supporters like you: | Whether your top concern is healthcare access, strengthening our economy, or LGBTQ+ advocacy, your feedback is invaluable as we determine our policy priorities for 2023. | Looking forward to hearing your thoughts, Scholten HQ | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: Join Us TODAY at Classic Bowling Center for our Fourth Annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive, 2 p.m. to 5 p.m.
body:
Fourth Annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive, 2 p.m. to 5 p.m., Saturday, December 10 at Classic Bowling Center | | | |
---
| | |
# Join us Saturday afternoon!

---
|
---
|
---
|
#### **Fourth annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive **
---
| After a two-year hiatus due to COVID, I’m delighted to invite you to join me and some of my best friends as we host the Fourth Annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive, 2 p.m. to 5 p.m., Saturday, December 10 at Classic Bowling Center, 900 King Drive in Daly City. Donate a new unwrapped toy and bowl for free. The event is cosponsored by my friend Keith Okada, who goes by Keith O, a world-class DJ and bowler who has been a fixture at Classic Bowling for 20 years now.
---
This is such a fun day to relax and have fun and to get your competitive juices flowing playing some ten-pin. Most importantly, though, it is a way to bring some joy to children in need during the holidays. Thank you to our partner Classic Bowling Center which has become a community gathering place for Daly City residents and hosts generations of family members. Hope to see you there!

To RSVP, contact Mike on my staff: [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org)[ ](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org?subject=Bowl-a-Thon%20and%20Toy%20Drive%20this%20Saturday%20in%20Daly%20City)or text: 415-845-1368
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=21de9c220c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=21de9c220c).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&afl=1)
---

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: These numbers are shocking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I’m writing to you today with an urgent appeal.
#
Peter,
I’m writing to you today with an urgent appeal. While our progressive coalition has been fighting to pass more life-saving policies before time runs out on this session of Congress, my team has been hard at work ensuring all of our operations are running smoothly.
But I just had a conversation with my team -- they’re very worried, Peter, and so am I. As it turns out, our fundraising has dramatically declined in the past year **_and we can’t sustain this pace any longer._**
Here’s the breakdown I got from my team. See for yourself:
**Time Period** | **Amount**
---|---
Quarter 4 2022: | $97,580
Quarter 4 2021: | $269,674
**Difference:** | **–$172,094**
[**It’s clear that we have to make up the difference as soon as possible, and that will only be possible if supporters like you chip in. Please Peter, -- trust I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important. Can you donate $3 or any amount to help?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24802?refcode=em20221210-1943&t=1&akid=1943%2E420207%2EvO2n7i)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24802?refcode=em20221210-1943&t=20&akid=1943%2E420207%2EvO2n7i)**
We’ve lost out on over $170,000 in the last year because our fundraising has slowed down so dramatically. And yet in that time, our progressive bloc has helped secure historic, transformative legislation that will change all of our lives for the better.
It has never been more important that we sustain our work for the long-term -- we know now that we CAN pass our progressive agenda, but we’re also facing a GOP-controlled House. **That’s why it is that much more important that we build up our resources now, get our fundraising back on track, and enter 2023 in a stronger position.**
[**What do you say, Peter, -- will you chip in $3 or more right now to help us reverse this downward trend and rebuild our resources from the ground up?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24802?refcode=em20221210-1943&t=21&akid=1943%2E420207%2EvO2n7i)
I believe in the strength of our grassroots movement. Since I’ve had the privilege of fighting for you in Congress, we’ve moved mountains together. But I can only continue to do that work and lead our Progressive Caucus with the assurance that our work will be sustained for the long-term.
**If we keep losing out on critical funds at this rate, we’ll be in a very serious situation.[I’m asking for your support today because it’s made a true difference at times when we needed it most, and I hope you’ll consider contributing now. Remember, any amount at all helps.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24802?refcode=em20221210-1943&t=22&akid=1943%2E420207%2EvO2n7i)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221210-1943-footer&t=23&refcode2=1943_420207_vO2n7i&akid=1943%2E420207%2EvO2n7i)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=1943%2E420207%2EvO2n7i)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=1943%2E420207%2EvO2n7i)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

body:

Grassroots Democrats are more driven than ever to fuel this movement – they know that electing Democrats to state legislatures across the country is the key to protecting voting rights, abortion access, and so much more from state Republican attacks. That’s why we’re reaching out right now: While our membership has grown to 1,895 Democrats strong, we were disappointed that your name wasn’t on our official local member list. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: BREAKING: President Trump Just Shared About Us!
body:
Today, President Donald Trump shared on TruthSocial about our newly launched organization called Pastors For Trump. You can read the Pastors For Trum
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9175.1.69a12c694ffecd8db7439f50f6ff0f3e)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9176.1.555526870a72b6d2f45412c925c40178)
---
Today, **President Donald Trump** shared on **TruthSocial** about our newly launched organization called [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9177.1.8c5b4e5556ee553aa15f5d2d5b8a982a). You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9178.1.ac458a76eb32a252f67bb3c78f9311ce)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9179.1.251d1da772afb40e2ba807cd7c955ea6) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9180.1.bdebea5f8153201a5ae3d4124a34a8e8) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9181.1.e5ed8ef572063bf2f89243c69eac55e7) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9182.1.351d498f7a2a48d8a3be5d36d62e6e98) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9183.1.99bca8220d346214407dbddc8212d713) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9184.1.9bffe8acb239e7768958379ff85ec253) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9185.1.da0cdebb1b823911f97dccc7feaa26be), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9186.1.3b88481d15e781cae75ffe8f8df9c225), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9187.1.b3daeb7e302bf4f9a6716345e4b4b339), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9188.1.af5157106063ed65edde4b0bdadc4184), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9189.1.6a440bdd69bf512e2eebd30f2ea35cb3) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9190.1.0235f4dfe762886c6e8c2523be0a49e7)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9191.1.2d379498db250d688b4bafab2aadc0da)
---

## Don't Miss Out!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9192.1.9e0c13f92b2c47ce11373d39f811bbaf)
---
Right now, **Biblical ILLITERACY** is at an _all-time high_ in America. Fewer than half of all adults can name the four Gospel writers, while 82% of Americans believe that _"God helps those who help themselves"_ is a Bible verse.
In a recent **LifeWay Research** study, the Bible reading habits among church attendees was shocking:
\- 19% read the Bible everyday
\- 26% read the Bible a few times per week
\- 14% read the Bible once a week
\- 22% read the Bible once a month
\- 18% read the Bible rarely or never
In general, American Christians have a poor foundation in the Word of God. This is a major problem and is the reason why I decided to launch [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9193.1.f84de0c1f899aba8677e0588463a386b).
I want to encourage you to consider [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9194.1.4cb6fa5e62aafb777731e133c43ab29a) as a means for you to grow in your faith and go from a convert to a true disciple.
[Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9195.1.4f4871427442e3f2f01cc4e3e016baa7) is a 1 year intensive program consisting of 12 courses divided between 2 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online.
_"Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"_ \- **2 Timothy 2:15**
Enrolling in [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9196.1.479d8b2270ca893f18ee8542dd0718e4) is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester.
**Fall Semester** :
\- Old Testament Introduction
\- New Testament Introduction
\- Theology of Worship
\- Church History 1
\- Faith & Prayer
\- Spiritual Growth
**Spring Semester** :
\- Christian Theology
\- Pauline Epistles
\- Apologetics
\- Church History 2
\- Leadership & Ethics
\- Evangelism & Outreach
Classes for the Spring 2023 Semester begin January 17. Enroll today at [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15843013.9197.1.731ee4ac0b28faaaa240368e51440d6a)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Oversight for the Trump Admin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
My first love is oversight.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15538%2E3422442%2EtXV0Hc)
My first love is oversight. Good government oversight is so important for the strength of our democracy, and it’s Congress’ job to hold power to account.
That’s why I recently sent a letter to the Department of the Interior requesting documents that could reveal **another incident of bribery between senior Trump Administration officials and a real estate developer.**
We came across this potential incident of bribery while investigating a separate quid pro quo scheme involving the Trump Administration and a developer. In May, my colleague Rep. Grijalva and I spearheaded an investigation that revealed how Trump officials overruled local authority to start a development project near an endangered river— _after the developer and his friends made a quarter of a million dollars worth of campaign donations._
**Our investigation led to a criminal referral for bribery.**
Cleaning up corruption is one of my main goals in Congress. Thanks to your support, I’m able to continue this important oversight work.
Katie Porter
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE10_TRU_20221210_V1_F&t=2&akid=15538%2E3422442%2EtXV0Hc)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=3&akid=15538%2E3422442%2EtXV0Hc)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=15538%2E3422442%2EtXV0Hc).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
