name: John Fetterman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m going to tell you about my tattoos, Derek.
#
Derek,
We both know I don’t look like a typical politician. Maybe that’s why my tattoos are *literally* the first thing people Google about me.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49601?refcode=em20221210-8161&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8161%2E434096%2Ec17eVO)
Well enough Googling. **Today I’ll tell you about my tattoos myself, Derek.**
**On my left arm I have the zip code 15104.** That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania, my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 15 years. Gisele and I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49601?refcode=em20221210-8161&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8161%2E434096%2Ec17eVO)
**On my right arm I have nine different dates.** These are the dates when people were killed through violence in Braddock while I served as mayor, starting in 2005. Seven out of nine were gun deaths. I actually have to get one more date added because in June of 2018, there was another tragic loss of life.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49601?refcode=em20221210-8161&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8161%2E434096%2Ec17eVO)
My first tattoo came after January 16, 2006. It was my second week on the job as mayor after winning my election by a single vote. I received a call and was summoned to a police crime scene where a pizza delivery man had been robbed and killed by gun violence.
**Every time Braddock lost someone was the worst feeling in the world, Derek.** In a close-knit community like Braddock, it’s very likely that you know the victim and their family. It’s an incredibly wrenching and personal experience as a mayor — but nothing compared to what the families have to go through.
In my 15 years as mayor, I worked with the community to take on gun violence and other important issues that Braddock faced every day. I helped initiate youth and art programs for the students of our community and we worked together to create a community center.
We also worked to develop buildings that had been written off, kick-started our economy, and reduced deadly violence. My proudest moment as Mayor of Braddock is when our community went 5 1⁄2 years without the loss of life due to gun violence.
**Derek, I’m going to the U.S. Senate believing that every community is worth fighting for.** Just like Braddock.
It is my promise to you that I'll fight for you + your community as if it were my very own.
That promise is written on my arms. Literally.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49601?refcode=em20221210-8161&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8161%2E434096%2Ec17eVO)
[If you want to have my back as I head to the U.S. Senate to fight like h*ll for working people, chip in a few bucks or whatever you can today. ](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49601?refcode=em20221210-8161&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=8161%2E434096%2Ec17eVO)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49601?refcode=em20221210-8161&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=8161%2E434096%2Ec17eVO)**
Thanks for all you do,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator-Elect

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221210-8161-footer&t=25&refcode2=8161_434096_c17eVO&akid=8161%2E434096%2Ec17eVO)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=8161%2E434096%2Ec17eVO)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=8161%2E434096%2Ec17eVO)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzFdv5yBEnaRCvkINk2pWJAuHF5TwLYC-wvuB1PTXfO3pA5IAeXb3hw3T9pX_Q3sfN0BHpRbIpo1EZgzjg8P82CAxtYrx-pxeh1CNDXsOh42KgzlPTDfoA-jGpnDIMA5V_kk1q5MYdCta8nRLWuSCQPnRt1eqBFJ4xwAXE4TaTu3lrKY1zepvBMfYBwYRhAAG_v4CcN-afiRV-AFRrcLQYndBiUtK5svAshCo3VsilMLmUeH6jvuiq6fcPNuZJEq5yHnRJls1_UouhCEWoUyFY4sWofxl0Ed42y9K1C7e2U6vPUGaJ0jxJaVXsH4He4Stk2jz2FBJ621HxeTVQ-u268q9RI0MW-dO63h-8nKF15-7RCm0ve7_EaC7Bs_v4QxBdZKpkNk_IBsNDxCY0ONX5e9MQO4b_2ILLFuJrwU9LLId/3rv/aY-WZjP-T6uTUGD9U-Nkqw/h0/TEyv2GOPiZ0wbqhlHZRi3_Nfv4A8fWFmVOAqM5ffoDA)

Peter, **Earlier his week, the House joined the Senate in passing the Respect for Marriage Equality Act. Once President Biden gives this bill his signature, same-sex marriage will be protected by federal law.**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmE-UZF0v-hLGyyNHgsAHFonsUpUbpMqwmx60suveb5r1Wa6_Fazl8rLVRgwR77h8MHnsuUs8mUFPxAsnrbBSzyXnmkFKbDju6DjJw1OSnaPh3v7GIGdlSzIpbQbRuPeHwO0OUBaOtFvZf9ysd01HwAcinp8rQm4-VtaeGTwPlNhZ1fGRwfbuf3VdmDgYp1qCVdvwFr67DNsTnRSPlIP6wQRIGzWhfa6Eg5OD5ZofdKFS2sVYvy-2yH1DiM6mO_lS2akYqv9Swo-rkq12U2a7VCWNdDjCygfoyBMme-oZmGAIlA3eYDK2ix5bEoIbcUj5xNle_eVeX9XVCTmy6vxuLs/3rv/aY-WZjP-T6uTUGD9U-Nkqw/h1/Zjftk0E4Y4iM-YRFqyFTd_5JpuU5gkvRMsDgK2cj4Yg)
---
The Respect for Marriage Act will enshrine same-sex into law, and as a result the federal government will never again stand in the way of marrying the person you love. This is obviously a huge step forward in the fight for marriage equality. On a personal note, I dealt with homophobic attacks in my latest campaign – and even at times during my career as a meteorologist. I know all too well what it’s like to be subject to discrimination based on sexual orientation, and I know that these attacks sadly persist in our country. **But here’s the bottom line: Most Americans believe that same-sex couples should be able to marry, because they understand that love is love. Full stop.** In Congress, I will always be a proud defender of LGBTQ equality. I will fight to ensure this law is enforced in IL-17 and around the nation. **[Take a moment to join me in support of marriage equality. Add your name at the link below.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmE-UZF0v-hLGyyNHgsAHFonsUpUbpMqwmx60suveb5r1Wa6_Fazl8rLVRgwR77h8MVk9epv_MKwaFpO_1XdGqAu5FFvCAhwPDPFXSUiPyuuOC-x7PPx944awlHuR9RDvDb_WmkX8ZriEyRzpmOkn0WKBf_yug0CNh9De_sz45j0ginRPSvHZ_bBKKs0YnUcwYiXPBMa4ZX82dfg-k_70SmP3reMQ6yJsA_gMd2RKGR3lmU1ufaTJZcjJpYlMeqO-vLiXjE3otzn57Dq70ofyfQ5G0fSKH2_aYfJ3hbhN5pce2kqwvDVq-6oTC4nqB4I20iduI6W5KSTZknXFyIMlM3/3rv/aY-WZjP-T6uTUGD9U-Nkqw/h2/3dLpLj9uOcs_6Mfy-HHK-FNzAkSL2_yQxFihblLjzC0)**

clean_body: | | Peter, Earlier his week, the House joined the Senate in passing the Respect for Marriage Equality Act. Once President Biden gives this bill his signature, same-sex marriage will be protected by federal law. | The Respect for Marriage Act will enshrine same-sex into law, and as a result the federal government will never again stand in the way of marrying the person you love. This is obviously a huge step forward in the fight for marriage equality. On a personal note, I dealt with homophobic attacks in my latest campaign – and even at times during my career as a meteorologist. I know all too well what it’s like to be subject to discrimination based on sexual orientation, and I know that these attacks sadly persist in our country. But here’s the bottom line: Most Americans believe that same-sex couples should be able to marry, because they understand that love is love. Full stop. In Congress, I will always be a proud defender of LGBTQ equality. I will fight to ensure this law is enforced in IL-17 and around the nation. Thank you for your time, Eric \-- Eric Sorensen Meteorologist | Congressman-elect (IL-17) 309-306-1717 | | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL . He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: A personal message from our Executive Director
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

As we gear up toward the end of the year, it’s incredibly important that
we can reach the fundraising goals we set many months ago for 2022. The
benchmarks we set are what allows us to continue recruiting and electing
historic candidates cycle after cycle.

We just successfully helped elect Greg Casar and Summer Lee to Congress,
but the work doesn’t stop — and neither can our fundraising. Without the
support of our grassroots donor base, we could be overpowered by the
millions of dollars in corporate money that the establishment will throw
at us.

But we have faith in our movement. That’s why our Executive Director
Alexandra Rojas filmed a personal message just for our most engaged
supporters, including you. We want to share a bit more about our
fundraising goals, why they’re so important, and what’s next for JD.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123095?refcode=em20221210-26487&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26487%2E1203867%2E3nKfPO ]Click to watch Alexandra’s video below and then consider taking a
moment to donate to power our work through 2022 and beyond:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123095?refcode=em20221210-26487&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26487%2E1203867%2E3nKfPO ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123095?refcode=em20221210-26487&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=26487%2E1203867%2E3nKfPO ]Watch the Video »

Thank you for all of your time and support — we appreciate you.

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=26487%2E1203867%2E3nKfPO ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=26487%2E1203867%2E3nKfPO ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221210-26487-footer&t=1006&refcode2=26487_1203867_3nKfPO&akid=26487%2E1203867%2E3nKfPO

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=26487%2E1203867%2E3nKfPO

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: | | | | | "Leadership" "Underdog" Last week, An America United hosted the first-ever Annapolis Leadership Summit, which brought together over 100 public and private sector leaders to discuss how to get America back on the right track. On the same day, An America United also hosted the Governor’s Celebration, where Governor Hogan spoke to approximately 1,700 supporters. An America United released a new video, titled “Underdog,” recapping these two major events promoting common sense leadership. Here's What They're Saying In The News About These Events: “Hogan and his wife, Yumi Hogan, Maryland’s first lady, later walked onstage to a band playing an instrumental cover of Sam and Dave’s “Hold on, I’m coming”, as party cannons showered his supporters in confetti. And Hogan regaled his fans with a video touting his underdog wins for governor in staunchly Democratic Maryland and lessons from his father, late Congressman Lawrence Hogan Sr., who broke with his party to support the impeachment of Richard Nixon..” “Bookending his remarks were highly produced videos by Hogan’s political group, ‘An America United,’ which highlighted the Hogan administration’s purported successes, and his response to the pandemic and the Freddie Gray riots.” “Before the fundraisers, Hogan held a leadership summit in Annapolis, the Maryland capital, to talk about the future of the country. Hogan has been a popular governor in a state where Democrats outnumber Republicans 2-to-1. He is only the second Republican governor to ever be reelected in Maryland.” “He strode across the ballroom’s massive stage to say thank you to his wife, Yumi, Lt. Gov. Boyd K. Rutherford ® and his cabinet after a highlight reel of his two terms, which offered accolades from his administration, a friend, state Comptroller Peter Franchot (D) and Hogan’s daughter.” “There was a big celebration Wednesday night in Hanover for outgoing Gov. Larry Hogan as he commemorates his eight years in office.” “Before the fundraisers, Hogan held a leadership summit in Annapolis, the Maryland capital, to talk about the future of the country.” “I am not about to give up on the Republican Party or on America. ... It’s too important’ Hogan said to a packed crowd of more than 1,300 people at Maryland Live! Casino in Hanover.” With Maryland widely known as the cyber capital of America, Governor Hogan is continuing to be a national leader on responding to cyber threats. Earlier this week, he issued an banning and prohibiting across State Government the use of China and Russia-based products and platforms that pose a threat to US cybersecurity, including TikTok. While the federal government has continued to on responding to TikTok and cyber threats, Governor Hogan has now issued the most aggressive action of any governor in America. Last year, Governor Hogan convened a at the Maryland State House in Annapolis focused on coordinated federal, state, and private sector efforts to prepare for and address cybersecurity threats. The Governor also announced more than $200 million in funding to modernize, strengthen, and expand the state’s cyber infrastructure. As Governor Hogan wrote in a with former NSA Director Admiral Dennis Blair, “For far too long, Washington has been asleep on cybersecurity. America’s vulnerabilities have been exposed and bemoaned, but not seriously addressed, much less fixed...It’s time to wake up.” "Governor Hogan joins CNBC's 'Squawk Box'" "Governor Hogan joins Fox News 'America's Newsroom'" | | AN UPDATE FROM TWITTER** | | | While the federal government is once again dragging their feet, in Maryland, we will not hesitate to protect our cybersecurity from foreign actors. We need less talk and more action. — Larry Hogan (@LarryHogan) | | | Yesterday, I joined with Chris Ryan to talk about the clear message voters sent in the midterms. Common sense conservatives can win anywhere, but we must offer a hopeful positive vision for America's future - not focus on the grievances of the past. — Larry Hogan (@LarryHogan) | | | I want to thank over 1,700 of our friends for coming out last night to help us celebrate the eight years of success they made possible. I'm very grateful for the opportunity to serve. People have always counted us out. But, every single time, we've beaten the odds. — Larry Hogan (@LarryHogan) | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | |

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, Since Kyrsten Sinema decided she’s no longer a Democrat, that means we need to think beyond a Democratic primary campaign. We’re now focused on a potential three-way general election where we will need to help a Democrat defeat both Sinema and a Republican. So, that means a name change for us. Say goodbye to “Primary Sinema” and hello to “Replace Sinema.” **** **[Sinema knew she couldn't win a Democratic primary, so now we need to beat her in the general election. Chip in now if you’re ready to defeat her in a 2024 general election >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSv9J5dKlNpoqaiqQd0mYDTSAZie5OF1qxHEQ0gIO1rEdBJkBZzJyHv4fQiUFvn3IpZH_leJ4YOIdqaHUG3fjV7-9Kjf1xBH_LGonWDuTsxM1H63oHJ5ATCyaMNdbnx8R94kyP_rI4duoGMV_vlWsHft32rR5q38MSPl_yhBOzsCt1pMfjEe0RUS7oG5prlYCcJl_TrVmXp9y7vFC3rkiU2aCTfUjJv7hbLiMA4a416SdjN7p6qUmvgdTp2L_xy3etNeQZXME-HSJTkvsAD_0Axl1oh8cNDkDEigTwArMN8rekMtP-LlCI5HKYhDGz31cC/3rv/UJtVpD7LS2aClVk3yUOa_g/h0/oeNCJSTe7ksxwUlBj8vW2T7K14vZa-tDeJnwT9p0Cz8)** You may have also missed we announced new core staff today: Emily Kirkland and Sacha Haworth have joined our PAC as senior advisors. Sacha actually worked for Kyrsten Sinema! | [ Biden Leaves Behind Marine Veteran In Prisoner Exchange that Freed Brittney Griner ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42369%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1fVvQq4m2oFG0buS3TWxGw&sysid=1)
---
[ Joe Biden has left U.S. Marine veteran Paul Whelan in Russian custody, choosing instead to secure the release of WNBA star Brittney Griner on Thursday. Whelan has been in Russian custody since 2018, held on espionage charges, while Griner has been detained since February after authorities discovered cannabis oil in her luggage. Biden had sought the release of both Americans in an exchange for notorious Russian arms dealer, Viktor Bout. But now it is clear that Biden was prepared to leave Whelan behind, prioritizing the exchange for Griner alone. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42360%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TObRu3xR%2bwlAi8pdzyD1bQ&sysid=1)

| **BREAKING:**
**_U.S. House passes _The Respect for Marriage Act_ , heads to the President's desk to be signed into law_**
---
This is incredible news.

Finally: LGBTQ+ and interracial marriage will be enshrined into federal law!

**In America, we all deserve equal rights and equal opportunities – _no matter our race, sexual orientation, or gender._**

All of us are created equal, and entitled to the same fundamental freedoms and justice under the law.

Today, I hope you will join me in celebrating this landmark moment in our history. Tomorrow, we will roll up our sleeves and continue the fight for progress.

There is much work to be done to expand freedoms and opportunity to all Americans, and I look forward to working toward that when I’m sworn into office next month.

Thank you,

Greg Landsman

clean_body: With so many races across the country, it can be tough to get an accurate picture of how voters in states like yours feel about the midterm elections. | | | | | State Democrats had a historic showing in this year’s midterm election! We notched victories in key battleground states like Michigan, Maine, Minnesota, and Pennsylvania. But with so many races across the country, it can be tough to get an accurate picture of how voters in states like yours feel about the midterm elections. Your voice, your time, and your support – these are the only reasons our party was able to make so many gains on Election Day. That's why we want to hear directly from you today. That’s why we launched our 2022 midterms exit survey – to see where our impact was strongest and identify what we need to work on ahead of the next elections. Thanks for your input, Team DLCC | ---|---|--- | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Electing Aaron Rouse is CRITICAL if Dems are going to capture the momentum in 2023.

|

We are living in unprecedented times. Climate change grows worse each year. Summer heat keeps breaking record highs. Extreme weather disasters are becoming more and more frequent across the entire country.

And yet 91%, **yes NINETY ONE PERCENT** , of plastic goes unrecycled.

Climate change grows worse each year. Summer heat keeps breaking record highs. Extreme weather disasters are becoming more and more frequent across the entire country. | | Listen, it is the Biden Family’s second holiday season in the White House as President and First Lady.

After the midterm elections, we think a happy holiday season is exactly what the Biden Family needs — and we want to make sure it is one to remember!

_We know this card will go VIRAL!_ So if you want to reserve your spot, we need you to sign in the next HOUR! **[⇩ADD YOUR NAME TO SIGN THEIR HOLIDAY CARD NOW⇩](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20221210_EMCARD_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=5799%2E878179%2E2rj5vV)** | [**ADD MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20221210_EMCARD_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=5799%2E878179%2E2rj5vV)

Look, President Biden and his family have done SO much since they moved into the White House in 2021\.

So we want to make sure they know how much we appreciate them — **_and we know your signature will mean the world to them!_**
**[Don’t miss your chance, our card will close tomorrow at MIDNIGHT!](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20221210_EMCARD_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=5799%2E878179%2E2rj5vV)**

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5799%2E878179%2E2rj5vV). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5799%2E878179%2E2rj5vV).**

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: Next Thursday: A very important announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this is
big:

I wanted to officially invite you to our virtual rally next Thursday with
Congresswoman-elect Summer Lee, officially launching our 2024 candidate
recruitment efforts.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123103?refcode=em20221210-26495&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26495%2E1203867%2EHPkT8Z ]Can you join us on Zoom at 8 p.m. ET on Thursday for the virtual event
with Summer, myself and a few special guests to officially launch 2024
Justice Democrats candidate recruitment?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123103?refcode=em20221210-26495&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26495%2E1203867%2EHPkT8Z ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123103?refcode=em20221210-26495&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=26495%2E1203867%2EHPkT8Z ]Sign Up

You’ll hear directly from Summer about the battle to win in PA-12 against
corporate Super PACs spending millions to attack her. You’ll also hear
from our staff about our path forward for 2024 and how we’re planning to
continue to challenge the political establishment by electing more
working-class, progressive candidates of color to fight for policies that
match the scale of the crises we’re facing.

Our candidate recruitment process is very intense and time consuming. We
will do thorough data analysis to find our target districts and then work
with community members as we sort through nominations and find the best
progressive candidate to run in the district. Then, we’ll work with their
campaign from start to finish.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123103?refcode=em20221210-26495&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=26495%2E1203867%2EHPkT8Z ]Please click here to register to join us next Thursday (12/15) 8 pm ET.
Zoom link provided after RSVP! Even if you can’t make the event, please
consider a donation to support our candidate recruitment launch.

I hope to see you there. With your support we will continue to build the
Squad.

With gratitude,

Alexandra Rojas

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1005&akid=26495%2E1203867%2EHPkT8Z ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1006&akid=26495%2E1203867%2EHPkT8Z ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.
